programme.title: Bones: The Beginning of the End
programme.desc: The team uncovers clues buried under a lifetime's worth of possessions, in order to solve the mystery of a hoarder's death. Meanwhile, Angela's father has a specific purpose for his most recent visit.

programme.title: Bones: The Mastodon in the Bedroom
programme.desc: With Cam's reputation and career on the line, the team travels from overseas to help her solve the case of an unidentified young boy.

programme.title: Bones: The Couple in the Cave
programme.desc: When the remains of a couple are discovered in a cave at National Park, the team must piece together the identity of the man and the woman as well as solve the crime. Booth's girlfriend and Afghanistan war correspondent makes a surprise visit.

programme.title: Bones: The Maggots in the Meathead
programme.desc: When Booth and Brennan are called to investigate decomposed remains found at the Jersey Shore, the team IDs the victim as Richie 'The V' Genaro, a 23-year-old who partied the night before at a popular nightclub.

programme.title: Arrow: Kapiushon

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: The Recruits

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: It Happened Last Night
programme.desc: The team is given a 22-hour deadline after the murder investigation of a Chief Warrant Officer who specialized in counterintelligence reveals his wife had been kidnapped and is being held for ransom.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Treasure Hunt

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Welcome to the Jungle

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: High Stakes
programme.desc: Percy and Lasalle go undercover at a high-stakes underground poker game after the organizer targets players with access to a naval research library.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Powder Keg

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Mind Games
programme.desc: Gregorio calls on Claire McGrady, her former behavioral science professor, when the team’s latest case matches one she studied during FBI training.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: The Assassination of Dwayne Pride

programme.title: The Office: Employee Transfer

programme.desc: Michael has big plans for his 15th anniversary party at Dunder Mifflin, but is in for a shock when the new Vice President has some ideas of his own. Meanwhile, Jim's prank on Dwight has some unexpected results.

programme.title: The Office: Two Weeks
programme.desc: Michael's relationship with the new vice president becomes increasingly tense after he finds excuses to goof off even more than usual. Meanwhile, Pam faces the challenge of a new copier and Kelly develops a crush.

programme.title: The Office: Dream Team
programme.desc: After starting off on the wrong foot with his new supervisor, Jim finds himself face to face with the new boss in a soccer game being held in the Dunder Mifflin parking lot. Meanwhile, Michael, afraid to face the workday, has trouble leaving his house.

programme.title: The Office: The Michael Scott Paper Company
programme.desc: Michael hosts a company luncheon, while Dwight and Andy strike up an unlikely friendship and plan a hunting trip.

programme.title: The Office: Heavy Competition
programme.desc: Dwight's loyalty to Michael is tested when he finds a new hero in Charles. Meanwhile, Andy tries to provide for all of Jim's emotional needs.

programme.title: Movie: No Time Like Christmas
programme.desc: After bumping into each other at a bed and breakfast before Christmas, a young woman and her old college boyfriend must work together to save the local theater with the Christmas Eve show.

programme.title: Movie: The Christmas Aunt
programme.desc: When a woman returns home to Tennessee two weeks before Christmas to take care of her niece and nephew while their parents are away, the last thing she expects is to reconnect with her childhood best friend.

programme.title: Movie: The Christmas Yule Blog
programme.desc: A well-known social media travel writer is given the assignment to cover a hundred-year-old Christmas parade in a small town, where she meets a high school music teacher who introduces her to a side of Christmas that she has never seen.

programme.title: Movie: A Crafty Christmas Romance
programme.desc: The owner of a craft and hobby store discovers an old copy of 'A Christmas Carol' among donations. In the book is a letter to Santa from 70 years ago and a valuable coin, so she sets out to find the owner with the help of the man who donated it.

programme.title: Movie: Twelve Men of Christmas
programme.desc: When her boss and fiancé betray her, a New York public relations executive finds herself in a small Montana town. She soon discovers that, when it comes to matters of the heart, a small town is just as complicated as the big city.

programme.title: Movie: Four Christmases and a Wedding
programme.desc: An event planner who has given up on love, but one day, she meets the perfect man. After learning that Mr. Perfect is being transferred overseas for work, she asks Santa to work his magic and bring them together.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas on Ice
programme.desc: A former champion figure skater, who runs the city's outdoor skating rink, falls in love with an unlikely benefactor.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Video Diary
programme.desc: When a gas station/ convenience store employee is found shot at point blank range, investigators find the entire murder has been caught on the store's videotape security camera.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Missing in Time
programme.desc: A young woman was reported missing after a fight with her husband. She was presumed to be dead and her husband was the prime suspect. Police were suspicious of a secondary suspect when he reported a suspicious fire in his car.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Church Disappearance
programme.desc: When a girl disappears from church, investigators fear a stalker is preying on children.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Photo Finish
programme.desc: A beautiful model goes missing and no one has a clue to her whereabouts until a park employee discovers photographs in a trash dumpster. With the photos are some vital pieces of information which eventually lead to a professional photographer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Visibility Zero
programme.desc: Analyzing the Amtrack Sunset Limited crash in 1993.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Flashover
programme.desc: A fire erupted in the Kings Cross Underground Station in London.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Planted Evidence
programme.desc: A woman is found beaten, bound, strangled and possibly raped outside of Phoenix. The nearby plants tell investigators more about the killer than any other single piece of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Southside Strangler
programme.desc: Learn how investigators caught Timothy Wilson Spencer, better known as the Southside Strangler, a serial killer responsible for the murders of five women in Virginia. This was the first use of DNA profiling in the U.S. justice system.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Accident or Murder?
programme.desc: Police believed that a husband murdered his wife after they learn that he had taken out a life insurance policy on her shortly before she died. When an investigator recreates the fall, the results are surprising.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Core Evidence
programme.desc: When a 16-month-old baby dies, tests discover e. coli in her system. Eventually the bacteria are traced back to a fruit juice manufacturer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dew Process
programme.desc: The wife of a well-known dentist is found dead, and her husband injured. Investigators use some fibres and a study of local weather patters the night of the murder to catch the guilty party.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Woman Scorned
programme.desc: When a young mother and her infant son are found dead in a cornfield, the obvious suspect is the husband and father of the victims. But some insects found on the bodies reveal a vital clue, as does a long, blonde hair found on the victims.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Naked Justice
programme.desc: The 29-year-old, pregnant wife of a young, successful attorney is found dead in her Michigan home of a gunshot wound to the head. Blood spatter analysis and a painstaking investigation led police to the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Treading Not So Lightly
programme.desc: When a four-year-old girl is found unconscious in a parking lot, police concluded it was a hit and run vehicle accident, and left it at that. But the girl's mother was determined to find out exactly what had happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: A woman is found dead of a gunshot wound and police conclude that she was murdered by her husband. Forensic scientists were able to piece together the clues and determine what really happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Without a Prayer
programme.desc: Madalyn Murray O'Hair and her two top lieutenants disappeared with no shortage of suspects. Her abduction may never have been solved if it weren't for the discovery of a headless, handless body, and the serial number on an artificial hip.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Common Thread
programme.desc: The year was 1984, and a serial killer was on the loose in Florida. Eight women had been found dead. At each crime scene, investigators found tiny red fibers, fibers they hoped would lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Dirty Deed
programme.desc: Eileen and Derrick Severs disappeared from their home in the small village of Hambleton in Great Britain, and police found evidence which suggested foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Micro-Clues
programme.desc: When a boy is found dead in a cornfield, traces of water from his body help lead investigators to the boy's killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Parasites
programme.desc: In the spring of 1993, an unexplained illness struck the residents of Milwaukee, Wisconsin. Health officials suspected it was influenza, but it proved to be more serious and more difficult to identify.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Video Diary
programme.desc: When a gas station/ convenience store employee is found shot at point blank range, investigators find the entire murder has been caught on the store's videotape security camera.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Missing in Time
programme.desc: A young woman was reported missing after a fight with her husband. She was presumed to be dead and her husband was the prime suspect. Police were suspicious of a secondary suspect when he reported a suspicious fire in his car.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Night Stalker: Summer Of Terror (Part 1)
programme.desc: The summer of 1985 was one of the hottest Los Angeles had seen in a century. But terrified residents weren't sleeping with the windows open, they weren't sleeping at all. A killer was on the loose. He was the Night Stalker.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Night Stalker: I WIll Be Avenged (Part 2)
programme.desc: A tip from a teenage boy leads to the identity of the Night Stalker. Twenty-four hours later a mob of angry citizens track him down and capture him.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Co-Ed Killer: The Murder Capital Of The World (Part 1)
programme.desc: A frantic public, desperate for answers, live in terror, waiting for the man they dubbed 'The Co-Ed Killer' to strike again. But no one could have expected that the person responsible, a local man, Edmund Kemper, was living among them.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Co-Ed Killer: Thinking Murder All Day Long (Part 2)
programme.desc: In April 1973, 24-year-old Edmund Kemper had murdered six coeds in and around the city of Santa Cruz, California, shaking the community to its core.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: A Chart Topping Dress
programme.desc: Country star Whitney Duncan needs a dress that, like her, commands centre stage. Rock girl Chic wants a gown that is hot, sexy and beautiful. Songwriter Kiirsten is nervous for her fitting, but should be more worried about her veil.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Smother's Day

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets: Coronavirus Crisis
programme.desc: Coronavirus has hit the Waldrops hard. School and sports are on hold, and Courtney's parents can no longer provide much-needed help during the day. In addition, Eric stops construction on the remodel as the family faces an uncertain financial future.

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets: Survival Mode
programme.desc: After years of renovations, the Waldrops finally move into their new home. School is starting for the boys, and fears of COVID-19 lead Courtney and Eric to consider homeschooling. They also decide to send the sextuplets to a speech pathologist.

programme.title: Little People, Big World: To Sell or Not to Sell
programme.desc: Matt surprises Amy with an offer to buy the north side of the farm, but she struggles to meet his deadline. Zach and Tori plan for a low-key Christmas as they adjust to life with baby Lilah, but Matt makes sure Jackson has the full holiday experience.

programme.title: Little People, Big World: Boxing Up the Past
programme.desc: Matt is eager to get the farmhouse in order, which leaves Amy stressed out and struggling to pack up 30 years of memories. Zach is up for the challenge of watching Jackson and Lilah alone for the first time, but two kids are a lot harder than one.

programme.title: Little People, Big World: Lilah's Big Scare
programme.desc: Valentine's Day is coming, but problems get in the way of romance. When Lilah's cold turns into something serious, Tori's worst fears are realized. As Chris puts pressure on Amy to move out of the farmhouse, Amy and Matt battle over missed deadlines.

programme.title: Little People, Big World: The Roloff Quaranteam
programme.desc: Matt's frustration grows as Amy continues to delay her move out of the farmhouse, but when COVID-19 hits, everything comes to a stop. The families come to terms with their new normal, and Zach and Jackson celebrate their birthdays in quarantine.

programme.title: Little People, Big World: Farmhouse Farewell
programme.desc: Matt clears out the farmhouse for the new renter. Meanwhile, Zach has a revelation that could change the future of the farm forever.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Before the Pops: Split Decisions
programme.desc: Shakisaha's earlobe split in half during a failed body modification attempt. After recovering from a flesh-eating disease, Kelly Ann developed a huge leg growth. Terrified of doctors, Dennis has gone 30 years without seeking treatment for his head bumps!

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Before the Pop: Itchy, Itchy, Ya-ya, Da-da
programme.desc: Musician Kayla has itchy eczema everywhere, making it difficult to play her guitar. Juan was bullied so badly over the painful bumps he has on his neck and torso that he dropped out of high school. Teresa has a mysterious, deflating arm growth.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Before the Pop: Twin Peaks
programme.desc: After being sucker-punched, Dexter developed a large mass that protrudes from his jaw. Zaria hopes her son might avoid the multitude of tiny face bumps that seem to run in her family. Tracie and Stacie are twins with matching head bumps.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Before the Pop: The Enormous Nose Nodules
programme.desc: Roger's case of rhinophyma is so extreme that he has difficulty breathing. The small, evenly spaced bumps all over Natalie's body are interfering with her life. Virginia thinks the equally sized lumps on her arms make her look like a football player.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Runaway Bump, Never Coming Back?
programme.desc: Leonard has an alarming bump hanging off of his arm that looks like it's breaking through the skin. Brandon has several lumps on his head that makes him fearful for his life. Jess got a noticeable lump on her butt after falling down the stairs.

programme.desc: Joe, Murr, Q, and Sal call out bizarre names while working the front desk of an office, and tonight's loser gets up close and personal with some strange feet.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Laundry Day
programme.desc: The guys look for partners in crime at a supermarket and throw caution to the wind as helpless romantics. Plus, tonight’s loser has a serious wardrobe malfunction.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Junk in the Trunk
programme.desc: Find out which two Jokers know how to practice transcendental meditation and which boy band member the guys met at Carnegie Deli.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Damned If You Do
programme.desc: Find out which joker once included inline skating as a skill on his resume, who was a mathlete and a bowler in high school and which joker was afraid of the dark as a child.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Up Loser's Creek
programme.desc: Find out which joker ran for Congress as a write-in candidate, which joker was a top-notch salesman before starting the show and who had a job in finance.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Rubbed the Wrong Way
programme.desc: Find out why the food court was picked for the 'stalk and text' challenge, what classic comedy inspired 'over the shoulder,' and who was lucky enough to test out the flying contraption for Joe the Genie.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Baggage Shame
programme.desc: Find out how Murr's old neighbour learns a little TMI about his personal life and which of the jokers Joe would want by his side in a fight.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Flatfoot the Pirate
programme.desc: Who made the call to give Murr a face full of slushie at the mall? How did the Jokers keep their props secret from each other before Laugh Man Standing? And whose breast milk did Pirate Sal chug?

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Quantum Mock-Anics
programme.desc: Find out which joker gets dizzy when a cab has a strong air freshener, who can speak Spanish, and which joker struggles to keep a straight face during Joe's 'expert' punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Spider Man
programme.desc: Find out which of the jokers is the handiest, who hates the taste of beer, and how Q's love of animals beat out his arachnophobia and made for a better punishment.

programme.title: Top Secret Videos: Crypto-Crush
programme.desc: Interns must hack their way into a new soda flavor as they watch videos of a bat nightclub, a drunk Santa bike ride, and an inappropriate way to open champagne.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Lost Boy
programme.desc: Find out which joker once worked as a fish monger, who lied on his resume to snag a TV internship and what chain restaurant the guys used during Sal's 'shush!' punishment at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Just Say No
programme.desc: Find out which joker loves blackjack, what baseball team two of the guys split season tickets for and how they found the lovely lady whose heart Q broke during his ball field punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Party Crasher
programme.desc: Find out which jokers were in on the surprise Gary Busey appearance, where the phrase 'tit for tat' came from, and how Murr's big mouth backfired on him, leading to this Statue of Liberty punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Putting the P in Pool
programme.desc: Find what Sal finds stressful about posing as a cashier; what's Q's favorite on-set beverage; and when did the crew have to arrive poolside to get a front row seat for Joe's pee punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Snow Way Out
programme.desc: Find out which Joker only drinks coffee after 2pm; who is most self-conscious about singing; and how long did Joe and Q wait inside while Murr and Sal hung out on a ski lift in the freezing cold.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dover and Out
programme.desc: The guys survey employees with odd questions, and tonight's loser unveils a mural in a small town whose residents react with big city rage.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stripteased
programme.desc: Find out what prop Q asked to keep from the dental damn challenge, what glazed delight is known to give Joe great power and how a doctor's appointment inspired Murr's striptease punishment.

programme.title: Top Secret Videos: Evaluation Session
programme.desc: The Interns of the NSA suffer through their worst fear: a randomized evaluation test administered by the mysterious higher-ups.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Losers Special
programme.desc: Dave Hill, Tone Bell, and Julian McCullough compete to finally earn a win or at least avoid the dreaded apology.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Champions Special
programme.desc: Megan Neuringer gets crazy eyes, Noah Gardenswartz knows what not to say during brain surgery, and Clayton English is convinced that a major pop star is watching him.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Free Kitchens
programme.desc: Julian McCullough knows what not to tell his kids, Arden Myrin reveals Julian is a mistake she'd make at a wedding, and Joel Kim Booster defends a famous chef.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Covered in Crabs
programme.desc: Gina Yashere knows what not to say after sex, Josh Wolf finds out what he and Wolverine have in common, and Kyle Kinane has rigor mortis in his pants.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Grandfathers of Anarchy
programme.desc: Noah Gardenswartz knows what a drug dealer shouldn't say, Gina Yashere talks juice cleanses, and Matteo Lane has an Easter bunny he'd swipe right for.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Gordon Ramsay
programme.desc: Host Sean Evans and his guests eat progressively spicy chicken wings.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Schoolboy Q
programme.desc: Find out how the five-time Grammy-nominated artist handles spicy food as he discusses his love of golf, his disdain for the 'Pokémon Rap' and his favorite shabby-shabu restaurant.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Dead Man Walking
programme.desc: Behind the scenes of the Carbonaro Effect.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: The Lizard Law
programme.desc: Never before seen footage; a severed camera cable; the magic team messing with Michael during a trick.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Serious Deja Vu
programme.desc: The trick that Michael initially thought was too goofy. The trick that took nearly a week of rehearsals and tested Michael's memory.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Top Priority of NASA
programme.desc: Find out what left a foul smell in our production office, how Michael met one of his current magic team members, and why Michael pretends to be hard of hearing. Plus, we have unaired footage.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Brawlers 4
programme.desc: A fight breaks out on the set of a live talk show; fans dressed as movie characters come to blows outside Grauman's Chinese Theatre; a dog faces off against his arch-nemesis, a turtle.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Brawlers 6
programme.desc: A guy with a rogue beer slingshot, a grown man losing a battle with a piñata, and Filipino friends freaking out over Miss Universe.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Brawlers 7
programme.desc: Subjects include a brawling bum on the Sunset Strip, fighting photographers at a Russian wedding, a mascot melee at a college football game and a high-school wrestler taking down the referee.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Brawlers 9
programme.desc: A throw down on the subway, a man having it out with his dryer, a llama that doesn't take kindly to strangers, a scenic stick battle in France and a slap-fight that quickly becomes a fight-fight.

programme.title: Movie: Ted
programme.desc: It's been 17 years since John Bennett's childhood wish came true, and his teddy bear came to life. Now John's girlfriend Lori wants to marry him, but first she wants the vulgar, hedonistic Ted to move out of their lives. This proves easier said than done.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Catastrophe
programme.desc: The guys serve up the goods at a juice bar, and tonight's loser confronts his biggest fear in a punishment that leaves him practically catatonic.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Vampire Weakened
programme.desc: The guys act frosty while working the ice cream counter, then take Joe's dogs for a romp in the park with help from some strangers. Later, tonight's loser watches his blood boil while performing with a gospel choir.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Stuffed Turkey
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr act as not-so-handy-men assembling furniture. Thanksgiving comes early for tonight's loser when he must talk turkey at a dating event.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: To Hatch a Predator

programme.title: Movie: The Last Song

programme.title: Movie: The Last Song
programme.desc: A rebellious teen and her brother are sent to Georgia to spend the summer with their ailing father, whom they have not seen in three years.

programme.title: Movie: Harry Potter and the Sorcerer's Stone
programme.desc: On his 11th birthday, Harry Potter receives a mysterious letter from the Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry, telling him he has been chosen as one of the future students of the renowned school.

programme.title: Movie: Harry Potter and the Chamber of Secrets
programme.desc: Harry is undaunted when he learns that great danger awaits him if he returns to Hogwarts. When he finally arrives at school, he finds a community in the grips of a mysterious and sinister terror that has literally 'petrified' some of its members.

programme.title: Movie: Harry Potter and the Prisoner of Azkaban
programme.desc: Harry learns that a murderer has escaped Azkaban prison and is believed to be after him.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Griddles n' Vittles
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's headed west for barbecue and beyond. In Los Angeles, a food court gem grills up homemade chorizo and a Yucatan turkey special. Then, in Las Vegas, Nevada, two funky joints fire up the grill.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Racing Through Charlotte
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's checkin' out high octane joints in Charlotte, North Carolina, with NASCAR driver Clint Bowyer. First, the relocated Triple-D alum dishin' out dynamite burgers and a unique spin on shrimp.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Tri-Continent Cuisine
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's checking out killer cuisine spanning three different continents. In Denver, a unique quick service spot dishes out a creative take on Indian curry. Then in northwest Denver, a Brazilian bistro cooks up the bomb croquettes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sammies and Spice
programme.desc: Guy Fieri visits Longmont, Colorado to check out what they're doing with cauliflower and pork burgers. In Columbus, Ohio, a Chicago-style restaurant makes Italian beef and gyros. Aarti Sequeira and Jet Tila meet Guy in Los Angeles for fiery Thai.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Family Legacies
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's visiting spots keeping up with their family ties. In Pleasantville, N.J., a wife carries on her husband's legacy with his down-home chicken and waffles and righteous ribs. In Colorado Springs, family recipes are made at a BBQ joint.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Delicious Discoveries
programme.desc: Guy uncovers surprising culinary discoveries. In Columbus, Ohio, a hidden gem inside a grocery store serves Nepalese-Tibetan specialties. A Mexican spot in Dallas serves seafood tacos and mole fries and another Dallas joint makes dishes from Afghanistan.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: That's Fresh
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's stopping by some joints that are keeping it fresh. In San Francisco, the Venezuelan joint serving up a totally gluten-free menu of authentic standbys like arepas and empanadas.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: All Kinds of Comfort
programme.desc: This trip, Guy dives into all kinds of comfort cooking. In Phoenix a funky joint stacks up barbecue fries and a new spin on chilaquiles. In Boulder a pizza place loads up the pies with their meatball grinder.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Barbecue, Batter and Beer Can Chicken
programme.desc: Maui, Hawaii has ridiculous ramen and beer can chicken. Los Angeles has a food truck with a twist on fish and chips. Plus, a barbecue spot with fried chicken.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sausage, Seafood and Shawarma
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's taking an eclectic, global-infused tour of Flavortown. In Minneapolis, an Italian spot carries on a fun, family pizza-making tradition, and in Miami, a champion chef cooks Haitian classics like griot, snapper and octopus.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Diners, Drive-Ins and Delis
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri heads to diners, drive-ins and delis. First up, Guy revisits a hoagie shop in Florida where the numbering system has him scratchin' his head. Then, in Denver, a Jewish deli is getting creative with their knishes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: A Triple D Thanksgiving
programme.desc: Guy's chasing down the holiday meal every which way. In Portland, Maine, a family-run joint where stuffed turkey and stuffed lobster are Thanksgiving traditions.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: All Kinds of Gobble Gobble
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's getting a variety of Thanksgiving tastes and treasures. From traditional turkey wild rice soup and pumpkin pie in Santa Fe, N.M., to a totally unique take on the Thanksgiving bird.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Southern to South American
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri digs into Southern comfort food and South American specialties. In Atlanta, a real-deal soul food spot dishing out collard green lasagna and a twist on fried chicken.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Mega Mouthfuls
programme.desc: Guy's unhinging his jaw for some mega mouthfuls! In Robbinsville, New Jersey, a real-deal Italian market cookin' up prosciutto bread and their multi-meat 'boss of the sauce'.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Turkey, Taters And Dogs
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's digging into a righteous mashup of flavors. In Orlando, Fla. Joey Fatone is riding shotgun to a potato-centric palace, plus a trip to his very own hot dog hangout.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Diners, Drive-Ins and Delis
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri heads to diners, drive-ins and delis. First up, Guy revisits a hoagie shop in Florida where the numbering system has him scratchin' his head. Then, in Denver, a Jewish deli is getting creative with their knishes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Coming Together in Cali
programme.desc: For this trip, Guy Fieri zeroes in on Chico, California, celebrating the town's food scene as residents and restaurant owners recover from ravaging fires that rocked the area.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: American Cookin'
programme.desc: Guy Fieri checks out some long-time joints at the heart of their communities.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: House Specials
programme.desc: Guy Fieri stops in for some one-of-a-kind specials, including The Red Arrow Diner in Manchester, New Hampshire, where they're cooking homemade Twinkies and have been baking 20 kinds of pie since 1922.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Diners You Sent Me To
programme.desc: Guy Fieri heads for three great diners that viewers recommended to him.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Blue Plate Specials
programme.desc: Guy Fieri searches out some off-the-hook specials, from fried pickles and homemade corn dogs in North Carolina and Italian beef in Chicago, to Los Angeles Governator's special breakfast.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Meat Mashup
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is reliving his most meat-tastic memories, starting in Kansas City, Mo., at an award-winning BBQ joint serving up pork belly burnt ends.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Something for Everyone
programme.desc: Guy visits one of his favourite places in Seattle from the very first season to see what's new for breakfast and lunch. In Minneapolis, Cuban cuisine has taken off since DDD visited, and in Portland, Oregon, two dudes still crank out crazy sandwiches.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Hometown Heroes
programme.desc: Guy us diving deep into beloved neighborhoods across the country to check out some local hot spots.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Martina's Table: Delaney's Birthday
programme.desc: Martina has assembled the perfect fiesta-themed menu for her daughter's 24th birthday. She whips up fresh salsa with avocado hummus for an appetizer and sweet potato and black bean enchiladas with colourful confetti rice for the main course.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Oh, The Weather Outside Is Frightful
programme.desc: Bad weather outside is perfect for snuggling inside, so Valerie Bertinelli and her husband, Tom, make comforting stay-at-home recipes like shrimp scampi with herb breadcrumbs, pull-apart garlic bread with asiago, and Helen's orange and fennel salad.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Try Something New
programme.desc: Everyone's trying something new in the kitchen, starting with Jeff Mauro's flavourful hot cheese crunchy mac and cheese. The hosts share new tricks, including Katie Lee's easy two-ingredient cupcake. Then, Geoffrey experiments with Wok Egg Foo Young.

programme.title: Giada's Holiday Handbook: Holiday Kick-Off Brunch
programme.desc: Giada kicks off the holiday season with a buffet brunch that features the flavors and ingredients of autumn. Her menu includes bacon cranberry scones with citrus basil butter, sweet potato and kale Spanish frittata and smoked salmon waffles.

programme.title: Giada's Holiday Handbook: Chicken and Pie Party
programme.desc: Giada hosts a chicken and pie party to kick off the fall and winter holidays with a menu of savory butternut squash crostada, lemony fried chicken, tiramisu ice box torta and lambrusco sangria. Each guest brings their favorite pie with the recipe.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Dinner on the Grill
programme.desc: Ree Drummond makes a Mexican-inspired family dinner on the grill, and Ladd pitches in with the cooking. The main course is a Drummond favorite, marinated Carne Asada, teamed up with skewers of juicy Chipotle Glazed Shrimp.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Four Under 40
programme.desc: Ree Drummond's dishing up four incredibly easy meals in less than 40 minutes. First up is her Chicken with Pesto Cream, the perfect food fix for a quick working dinner. Next, Cajun Veggie Pasta is brilliant for kids when you are in a time crunch.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Fall for Your Pantry
programme.desc: The Kitchen hosts fall in love with the pantry thanks to seasonal dishes using pantry staples. Katie Lee starts things off with her chicken bolognese using a secret ingredient that stumps all the hosts, evaporated milk.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Comfort Cooking with Ma
programme.desc: Ma's coming by for dinner, so Kardea Brown is cooking up some of her favorite comfort food classics, including Carolina Smothered Chicken with Creamy Mustard Sauce, Wild Rice with Mushrooms, Roasted Broccoli Salad and Sweet Potato Cheesecake.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Southern at Heart
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood is revisiting her most-comforting and crowd-pleasing Southern recipes, including Country Ham Biscuits and Scallion-Pimento Cheese, Pete's Catfish, Fried Green Tomatoes and her family's special recipe for Eboo's Wild Scuppernong Pie.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Everything From Scratch
programme.desc: Making an entire meal from scratch is a challenge- now imagine doing it in only 30 minutes! Four chefs who specialize in scratch cooking take on two grueling rounds, making everything from the bottom up.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: GGG Judges and Their Siblings
programme.desc: The flavourtown family gets a little bigger as some of GGG's most beloved judges bring their siblings to compete alongside them. First, the teams must shop for everything in their 'Childhood Favourite.'

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: All ABC Games
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's ABC games aren't as easy as 1, 2, 3! The chefs must prove their skills in three rounds as they make comfort classics and dinners with seafood and fried ingredients.

programme.desc: A weekday NFL news and information show with Laura Rutledge joined by a rotating cast of NFL analysts, insiders and reporters.

programme.desc: Host, Tony Reali, and sports reporters representing each time zone via satellite, banter about their local and national sports stories. Reali hosts and keeps score on every comment from his studio where he is connected to each columnist's newsroom.

programme.desc: Jeremy heads to remote wetlands to investigate reports of a brutal riverside mutilation where he comes face to face with one of South America's greatest freshwater fighters and uncovers the slasher stalking Argentina's River of Blood.

programme.title: River Monsters: Bone Crusher
programme.desc: Jeremy is on the trail of a new river monster after a corpse is found with highly unusual injuries. He also uncovers a spate of disappearances and a mysterious creature patrolling the water.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Murders in Maine
programme.desc: When a young mother in Newport Maine goes missing, the case goes cold...until another mom suddenly vanishes, sparking an investigation that leads to a deadly game of cat-and-mouse and grisly discoveries in a rustic backyard.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Fugitive Millionaire
programme.desc: A tech giant living in paradise. His neighbor found dead. Then, suddenly, the entrepreneur extraordinaire was on the run, taunting authorities and tantalizing the press. It was a riveting game of hide-and-seek, but were police chasing the right man?

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Last Dance
programme.desc: A beloved kindergarten teacher and mother of two finds a new lease on life after shedding hundreds of pounds. When she suddenly vanishes from her home, investigators uncover a disturbing connection.

programme.title: License to Kill: Killing Everything
programme.desc: After an orderly is arrested for killing a patient at a Cincinnati hospital, a local reporter gets a tip that leads him to uncover new information about a string of horrifying deaths.

programme.title: License to Kill: Homicidal Homecare
programme.desc: A beloved grandfather vanishes out of the blue. Strange activity in his financial records leads detectives on a chase from California to Mexico, where they reach a devastating conclusion.

programme.title: License to Kill: Murder by Syringe
programme.desc: A Glendale, CA, hospital worker confesses to suffocating dozens of his patients. Investigators fear he'll walk free because doctors believe the victims died of natural causes.

programme.title: Dateline: Before Midnight
programme.desc: A successful business woman and mother of three is found shot in her office. She was the center of her kids' universe, dedicated to her financial planning firm and had recently gotten engaged.

programme.title: Dateline: She Never Left

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Bondurants
programme.desc: A pair of larger than life identical twins commit a series of brutal attacks in a small Tennessee town. With each crime, the brothers grow more emboldened. As time goes on and with little evidence against them, there's no telling how far they'll go.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Vues
programme.desc: When a correctional officer is murdered it seems like an act of vengeance, but soon a love triangle is exposed. After learning his wife is having an affair, a husband plans to kill her lover and enlists the help of his brothers to carry out the task.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Gustafsons

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Stovalls
programme.desc: When their brother is convicted of murder, three siblings hatch a deadly plot to avenge him by targeting the star witness in his trial. The plan goes awry when the wrong person is on the receiving end of their vengeance.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Williams

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Bevers

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Carrs
programme.desc: The Carr brothers arrive in Wichita intending to commit robberies, but their plans quickly escalate to a murderous spree the likes of which Kansas had never seen. The reign of terror by the brothers is later known as the 'Wichita Massacre.'

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Rosas

programme.title: Family Guy: The Griffin Winter Games

programme.title: Archer: The Double Deuce

programme.title: Movie: The Maze Runner
programme.desc: A boy wakes up in an ascending elevator with no memory of who he is or how he got there. He joins a group of other boys trapped in an enclosed area surrounded by an enormous maze. His only hope for escape is by piecing together clues about his past.

programme.title: Movie: Maze Runner: The Scorch Trials
programme.desc: Having escaped the Maze, the Gladers face even greater challenges as they traverse a desolate and dangerous wasteland in a world ravaged by a deadly disease.

programme.title: Movie: Anchorman 2: The Legend Continues
programme.desc: The Channel 4 news team reunites to helm a 24 hour news channel, but they have some stiff competition.

programme.title: Movie: The Hangover
programme.desc: Two days before his wedding, three friends decide to take a groom to Las Vegas. Since the bride-to-be doesn't approve of bachelor parties, the men lie to her about their trip. After a wild night of partying, the guys wake up to find the groom missing.

programme.title: Movie: Dr. No
programme.desc: A secret agent investigates a fellow agent's death and encounters a mysterious scientist.

programme.title: Movie: From Russia With Love
programme.desc: Bond is sent to Istanbul to steal a Russian decoding machine and ends up in a trap.

programme.title: Movie: Goldfinger
programme.desc: James Bond must prevent an international gold dealer from ruining Fort Knox's gold reserve.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show: Jessie Buckley, Bill Bailey, Octavia Spencer, Frank Gardner, David Walliams and Dermot Kennedy
programme.desc: Graham welcomes Jessie Buckley, Bill Bailey, Octavia Spencer, Frank Gardner, David Walliams and Dermot Kennedy.

programme.title: Movie: From Russia With Love
programme.desc: Bond is sent to Istanbul to steal a Russian decoding machine and ends up in a trap.

programme.title: Movie: Goldfinger
programme.desc: James Bond must prevent an international gold dealer from ruining Fort Knox's gold reserve.

programme.title: Hidden Habitats: Great Barrier Reef
programme.desc: The Great Barrier Reef's size is revealed as a mosaic of environments. However, scale isn't the only success of this micro world. The reef exists in nutrient poor waters, which on the face of it, is too poor to support all this life.

programme.title: Hidden Habitats: Galapagos
programme.desc: Travel to the most famous archipelago on Earth, the Galapagos. The islands are home bizarre and unique creatures.

programme.title: Wild Singapore: Hidden World
programme.desc: In this first episode, we explore Singapore's hidden wilderness, overlooked areas of the island that are home to an astonishing variety of fascinating creatures.

programme.title: Wild Singapore: Islands
programme.desc: Head beneath the waves of Singapore's coast and islands to discover some of its aquatic animals, including the rare tiger tail seahorse, the powerful pistol shrimp and the dog-faced water snake.

programme.title: Wild Singapore: Forest Life
programme.desc: An exploration of Singapore's forests, which are home to some of the least known primates in the world, flying dragons, mating snakes, and many more.

programme.title: Planet Earth: From Pole to Pole
programme.desc: The ultimate portrait of our planet looks at the key factors that shape our natural history. In the Arctic spring, a mother polar bear and cubs have two weeks to cross the frozen sea. Time-lapse cameras capture the transformation created by floods.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Mountains
programme.desc: A tour of the mountain ranges reveals how animals rise to the challenge of mountain life. The snow leopard finds habitat in the largest glaciers of the world.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Fresh Water
programme.desc: Follow the descent of rivers from their mountain sources to the sea. Witness unique and dramatic moments of animal behaviour, including a piranha frenzy and a showdown between otters and crocodiles.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Caves
programme.desc: Although often overlooked, caves are remarkable habitats with equally bizarre wildlife. This documentary provides a unique access to a hidden world of stalactites, stalagmites, snotites and troglodytes that brings a wealth of surprises.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Deserts
programme.desc: Deserts cover one fifth of the planet and they are spreading every year. We think we are familiar with the Sahara and the Kalahari but what about the Gobi or the Atacama -so many deserts have hardly been explored.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Ice Worlds
programme.desc: The Arctic and Antarctic experience the most extreme seasons on Earth. Time-lapse cameras watch a colony of penguins, while aerial images show a polar bear swimming more than 100 km.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Great Plains
programme.desc: After filming for three years, the shy Mongolian gazelle and the bizarre-looking Tibetan fox are captured on film. Over six weeks, the team follows a pride of 30 lions as they attempt to hunt elephants.

programme.title: Ultimate Survival Alaska: Going Rogue
programme.desc: Slashing through a thorny gantlet of devil’s club, the teams charge for the insertion flag in leg six. After reading their maps, some head for the high ground to escape the dungeon of thorns, while others bushwhack directly through the forest.

programme.title: Ultimate Survival Alaska: Live Before You Die
programme.desc: The teams begin leg seven on remote tundra in the shadow of Mount McKinley. The area is known for being some of the most brutal, inhospitable terrain in Alaska.

programme.title: Ultimate Survival Alaska: Savage Waters
programme.desc: The teams are dropped on the banks of the Tazlina River and tasked with building log rafts. Faced with punishing rocks and class four whitewater, their designs are crucial to their success and survival.

programme.title: Ultimate Survival Alaska: Kodiak Killers
programme.desc: Dropped on Kodiak Island, the teams face their fiercest challenge yet - Kodiak brown bears.

programme.title: Ultimate Survival Alaska: Covert Ops
programme.desc: In leg 10, the teams continue their adventure in the Kodiak Islands, this time with the choice of traveling by land or by sea. The competitors are dropped on a remote beach, where they race to the insertion flag and find a cache of sea kayaks.

programme.title: Ultimate Survival Alaska: Final Gauntlet
programme.desc: Beaten down after weeks in the Alaskan backcountry, the competitors brace for one last battle involving treacherous glaciers, volatile rivers and perilous mountains.

programme.title: Drug Lords: The Next Generation: Escobar's Apprentice
programme.desc: From the ruins of Pablo Escobar’s Colombian cocaine empire, a new type of drug lord emerges.

programme.title: Drug Lords: The Next Generation: Colombian Cocaine Boss
programme.desc: An unprecedented investigation forces a major drug trafficker out of the shadows.

programme.title: Drug Lords: The Next Generation: A Narco Speaks
programme.desc: Guatemalan businessman Otto Herrera finds himself in the middle of a cocaine gold rush.

programme.title: Drug Lords: The Next Generation: High Demand
programme.desc: Some of the most ingenious smuggling attempts reveal the secret investigations that brought them undone.

programme.title: Drug Lords: The Next Generation: Smuggler Down Under
programme.desc: Paul Le Roux wants more than anything to be a cocaine kingpin like his idol, Pablo Escobar.

programme.title: Drug Lords: The Next Generation: Narco Ghost
programme.desc: Investigative journalist Jeremy McDermott is on the trail of a secretive Narco.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Treasures of the Lost Mine
programme.desc: Caverns hidden deep inside a remote mountain are home to a precious mineral found nowhere else on earth, and experts and treasure hunters use cutting-edge technology to follow rumours of a mysterious long-lost mine in search of a payday.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Mystery of the Lost Labyrinth
programme.desc: A strange, centuries-old labyrinth built into an abandoned quarry was built by an eccentric millionaire, and no one knows why; but now, a new excavation into this mysterious 9,000-foot tunnel system might finally reveal its dark secrets.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Secrets of the Terror Tunnels
programme.desc: A vast system of tunnels built almost three thousand years ago was the site of the greatest battles of antiquity, and these disorienting passages could be the deadliest weapon in war. Experts reveal what made this underground world so terrifying.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: World's Biggest Labyrinth
programme.desc: The world's biggest labyrinth is a 1,553-mile cave system that's home to some of history's darkest mysteries, and new discoveries at this strange place reveal the long-lost secrets of Nazi occupation, Soviet revolution, and Cold War subterfuge.

programme.title: How It's Made: Personal Watercraft, Ice Skates, Wine, Office Furniture
programme.desc: Discover how personal watercraft, ice skates, wine, and office furniture are made.

programme.title: Tomorrow's World Today: Power of Protein
programme.desc: Health-conscious George sends Tamara to investigate the discovery and innovation of whey protein. Tamara recruits an "everyday athlete" to take a protein and exercise challenge - will he be proof of how whey boosts nutrition?

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Cave of the Body Snatchers
programme.desc: An eerie system of underground vaults in Scotland was once the hideout for thieves who stole newly-buried bodies and sold them; today, experts are excavating these rubble-filled caves to reveal the secrets of what these bandits left behind.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Secrets of the Rock
programme.desc: A hidden, subterranean city built within the Rock of Gibraltar was an immense fortress to control the seas during World War II, and new discoveries reveal the secrets of a long-lost chamber with evidence of high-stakes espionage.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Ghosts of the Hell Maze
programme.desc: A labyrinth of vast tunnels in the French countryside has served as a secret hideout during wartime for centuries, and on its walls, experts have discovered the final confessions of soldiers who fought here during one of the deadliest days of World War I.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Curse of Cannibal Caves
programme.desc: A mysterious cave system is home to some of the oldest human remains ever discovered, and today, the explorers and researchers investigating this site are uncovering shocking evidence of cannibalism among its Ice Age denizens.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: The Renegade's Lair
programme.desc: A strange underground system known as the Black Cave is connected to a fairytale castle and was home to an infamous nobleman on the run from the law; today, experts investigate the secrets he left here to discover new parts of this mysterious network.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Arctic Doomsday Device
programme.desc: A top-secret military base hidden deep in the ice beyond the Arctic Circle is one of the Cold War's most elaborate cover-ups, and recently declassified documents reveal its deadly purpose, and the threat it might still pose to all humankind.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Curse of the Ice Princess
programme.desc: After a 2,500-year-old mummy is discovered in Siberia, locals report strange, cataclysmic events that point to an ancient curse; using cutting-edge archaeology, experts reveal who this person was and if they've unleashed something sinister.

programme.title: Diabolical: A Life of Lies
programme.desc: Prichard AL is normally a quiet town but when the body of Re'Mano Campbell, a loving father, is found slain in his house the community grows apprehensive. And it'll take the cunning wit of local investigators to unravel the mystery of his murder.

programme.title: Diabolical: Who Needs Enemies
programme.desc: A cold morning in December starts off like any other until a rural farmer discovers the body of a dead woman. What seems like a sadistic rape and murder turns into a conspiracy and before long the diabolical nature of someone close is revealed.

programme.title: Diabolical: Family or Foe
programme.desc: A young family in La Mirada, CA is out for an evening stroll when terror strikes. For investigation nothing seems to add up. Is it random violence or a mastermind at work? The truth will take years to emerge.

programme.title: Diabolical: Hands That Rob the Cradle
programme.desc: In early 1980, two eerily similar crimes occur 400 miles apart. They both leave young mother dead and an infant child stolen. Years later, police unravel a plot so cold-blooded, it leaves everyone even seasoned homicide detectives in utter shock.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Maria Spencer's Vow to Kill
programme.desc: A bitter divorce, two arsons and a Pennsylvania father killed execution style; friends say he predicted his own murder.

programme.title: 48 Hours: NCIS: A Sailor's Honor
programme.desc: NCIS agents reveal the hunt for answers in the disappearance of payroll officer Andy Muns, the organization’s oldest cold case. Muns disappeared in 1968 and was treated as a deserter and thief, but new evidence could restore honour to the fallen sailor.

programme.title: The Body on Bowden Road
programme.desc: The murder of 20-year-old Stephanie 'Shea' Graham rocks her small Alabama community. After detectives track her final movements, they find a suspect but what he has to say shakes them to their core.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Hunting Ground
programme.desc: Nicole White is in the middle of a bitter custody battle when she vanishes. Suspicion falls on an online date until her husband turns up unexpectedly with his face scratched.

programme.title: 48 Hours: NCIS: A Sailor's Honor
programme.desc: NCIS agents reveal the hunt for answers in the disappearance of payroll officer Andy Muns, the organization’s oldest cold case. Muns disappeared in 1968 and was treated as a deserter and thief, but new evidence could restore honour to the fallen sailor.

programme.title: The Body on Bowden Road
programme.desc: The murder of 20-year-old Stephanie 'Shea' Graham rocks her small Alabama community. After detectives track her final movements, they find a suspect but what he has to say shakes them to their core.

programme.title: Web of Lies: With Friends Like These
programme.desc: A young girl has lewd photos of her taken at a party, with no memory of the night. Her world is turned upside down and the public shaming pushes her over the edge.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Case Against Brooke Skylar Richardson
programme.desc: The parents of Brooke Skylar Richardson speak out. The real story behind the international headlines in the case of an alleged unthinkable crime.

programme.title: Deadly Sins: Conspiracy of Sinners
programme.desc: A church becomes a bloody battlefield when a rage-filed woman and her dysfunctional family come to town. Then, a woman meets a surgeon on the hunt for perfection, she will discover he has a lust for blood, and she is his prey.

programme.title: Deadly Sins: Until Lust Do Us Part
programme.desc: A successful couple has everything they could want, but one of them is consumed by a lust that will destroy their marriage, and end one of their lives. Later, a stripper with a tragic past marries a kind man, but when greed takes hold, it leads to blood.

programme.title: A Murder in Mansfield
programme.desc: In 1990, the testimony of a 12-year-old boy sealed his father's fate. A jury convicted prominent Ohio doctor John Boyle of murdering Collier's mother. 26 years later, the son returns determined to get an admission of guilt from his imprisoned father.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: A Killing on the Cape: Part One
programme.desc: A former A-list writer is found murdered in her Cape Cod home. In the aftermath, rumours run rampant as a tangled web of relationships is revealed. Nothing would prepare the community for the shock of who was arrested, and the stunning claim he made.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: A Killing on the Cape: Part Two
programme.desc: A former A-list writer is found murdered in her Cape Cod home. In the aftermath, rumours run rampant as a tangled web of relationships is revealed. Nothing would prepare the community for the shock of who was arrested, and the stunning claim he made.

programme.title: Suspicious Minds: Who Killed the Councilman?
programme.desc: Matt Garcia, a popular young city councilman, is shot dead in Fairfield, California. Politicians and an anxious public demand answers. Drug dealers, political rivals, and even Matt's own father fall under suspicion.

programme.title: Suspicious Minds: In Case of Murder
programme.desc: The untimely death of Melissa Henderson, wife and mother of two, rattles a small Indiana town -- but revelations of foul play at her funeral set the rumor mill ablaze. Local gossip leads investigators to a riverboat casino with unexpected suspects.

programme.title: Suspicious Minds: Chi Town Gossip
programme.desc: The brutal murder of a local icon upends a tight-knit Chicago community. Neighbors whisper about the killer's identity and detectives must break down walls of silence to uncover the shocking plot to murder a mother and owner of a successful hair salon.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Twisted Plan
programme.desc: When trusted legal assistant Gail Spencer fails to show up for work, her coworkers are rightfully concerned. But as the sordid details of her abduction come to light, suddenly it seems like someone at the office may know more than they are letting on.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Primal Instincts
programme.desc: It's Mother's Day and first-time mom Tennyson Jacobson is looking forward to celebrating with her family. But when she spends her daughter's naptime fighting off a violent intruder, Tennyson can't shake the feeling he'll soon be back to strike again.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: No Escape
programme.desc: When Peggy Klinke returns to school to pursue her dream of becoming a doctor, she catches the eye of fellow student Patrick Kennedy. But their relationship eventually leads them down a terrifying path of jealousy, obsession, and murder.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Alexander The Great's Spidermen
programme.desc: Alexander the Great confronts a rebel warlord in an impregnable mountain stronghold. He despatches 300 hand-picked warriors to scale the sheer rock face at night without being detected. It's a brutal test of climbing skill and raw courage.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Kung Fu Nun
programme.desc: 1644. Ng Mui escapes from Beijing. Taking refuge in a Shaolin monastery, she learns their Kung Fu and develops a new form of the martial art.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Sacred Band of Thebes
programme.desc: In 371 B.C., ancient Greek superpower the Spartan army confronts the three hundred warriors of the Sacred Band of Thebes.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Caught in a Love Triangle
programme.desc: Henry Lee Marshall is obsessed with Martha Leathers, and in a fit of jealousy, kills her husband and flees. Unable to stay away for long, Marshall returns to harass her. Finally, after nine years of stalking Martha, his time on the run comes to an end.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Copy Movies
programme.desc: A successful video pirate scams the film industry while partying with celebrities and hiding from the law.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Steal a Rich Woman's Jewelry
programme.desc: An elderly woman puts up a fight when an ex-employee tries to steal her rings, and is murdered.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Taunt the Cops
programme.desc: Jimmy Maxwell is no stranger to prison life. But every time he gets arrested, he outsmarts officials and escapes. His go-for-broke nature makes him a menace for authorities, who come face to face with his volatile nature each time they corner him.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Revenge
programme.desc: Marshall Brown was 19 when he committed his first contract killing. A drug dealer put a hit out on Horace Morrison. Brown was soon convicted and spent the next 19 years in prison planning his escape. This is the story of his life on the run.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Steal a Rich Woman's Jewelry
programme.desc: An elderly woman puts up a fight when an ex-employee tries to steal her rings, and is murdered.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Sacred Band of Thebes

programme.title: Warrior POV: Road to Baghdad
programme.desc: See the shot by shot firefights in the 21 day bloody battle for Baghdad from the warrior's point of view.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Tet Offensive
programme.desc: During the infamous Tet Offensive of 1968, an elite band of US Special Operations troops are called in to rescue dozens of helpless civilians trapped in the border town of Chau Doc, which has been captured by an overwhelming Viet Cong invasion force.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Search and Destroy
programme.desc: In a battle known as the Nine Days in May, the troops of the US 4th Infantry Division are on a search and destroy mission in Vietnam's Central Highlands when they run headlong into a massive force of North Vietnamese soldiers on the Cambodian border.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Chosin: One Way Out
programme.desc: Trapped and outnumbered seven to one early in the Korean War, US Marines must fight their way out or die.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Baghdad: Thunder Runs
programme.desc: In what would become one of the most brutal and decisive battles of the Iraq war, a battalion of tanks punches a hole right into the heart of Saddam Hussein's Baghdad in 2003. They are the first Mechanised force to enter a capitol city since WWII.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Fallujah: The Taking of Terror Central
programme.desc: Operation Phantom Fury was meant to be a 48 hour battle but insurgents, armed with IEDs and a stockpile of grenades, fought back. US forces faced one of the toughest urban conflicts since Vietnam as they tried to reclaim the city.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Striking it Rich
programme.desc: Discover the real facts behind America's biggest economic boom and biggest bust, and learn the truth behind some of Las Vegas' greatest myths.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Yankees, Rebels and World War II
programme.desc: World War II myths are explored. Forgotten truths of America's Civil War are examined.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Flying Machines
programme.desc: Man created flying devices in order to travel the world and fly into space. Learn about Apollo 11 and how it came home with the help of a pen and about Air Force One, which is not a machine, but a code name.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Science or Sci-Fi?
programme.desc: The science in our nation's history is examined. Explore the myths that infect America's medical history and learn the facts behind America's nuclear age.

programme.desc: After spending years renting on Lake Wedowee in Alabama, Chris and Jenny are ready to purchase a vacation home for their family. A local agent helps the couple land a charming lakefront property, but it's in need of major improvements.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Georgia Reno on Their Minds
programme.desc: Outdoor enthusiasts John and Heather are looking for a vacation retreat for their family on Lake Oconee in Georgia, and they find a fixer-upper in an ideal setting.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Wicked
programme.desc: Four cupcake bakers battle for a place at the star-studded party for the Los Angeles opening of the hit Broadway musical 'Wicked.'

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: L.A. Bridal Bash
programme.desc: Four teams of mother-daughter bakers fight to have their delicious cupcakes at the centre of a Los Angeles bridal bash.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Cupcakes 'r' Us
programme.desc: Four imaginative bakers are going to have to unleash their inner child as they compete for the chance to serve their creations at a black tie awards gala for the Chicago Toy and Game Fair.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: We're Nuts for the Holidays
programme.desc: The Holiday Baking Championship kicks off as 10 competing bakers take on a nutty chocolate dessert in the first challenge and beautifully-decorated holiday pies in the main heat.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Holiday Craftiness
programme.desc: This week, it's time to get crafty! The remaining nine bakers attempt to amp up the visual impact of holiday baked goods as they create festive candy cane and holiday wreath desserts.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Stuffing Is the Best Part
programme.desc: The eight remaining bakers begin by making their best holiday whoopie pies that evoke a randomly-assigned theme of turkey, pumpkin, Pilgrims or fall foliage. Then, they must create stuffed holiday cakes that reveal a surprise center when sliced open.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Thanksgiving's Just Around the Corner
programme.desc: The seven remaining bakers get creative with Thanksgiving-inspired desserts, and in the first round, their sweets feature canned cranberry sauce. Then, in the main heat, the bakers must invent a dessert highlighting their assigned harvest ingredient.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Ginger and Spice and Everything Nice
programme.desc: In this week's challenges, the six remaining bakers revel in the warm, taste bud-tingling flavour of ginger. They must make mini desserts highlighting candied ginger, then create three different types of holiday cookies inspired by family traditions.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Fried
programme.desc: From seafood and beef to pork and cheese, all the best foods taste better fried and Roger Mooking is scouring the country in search of the 12 best fried-food dishes. He's hanging out with fried-food-loving chefs learning all their secrets.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Get Your Grill On
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is in Lockhart, Texas, to meet the team responsible for designing and crafting a monster rig that offers seven different cooking contraptions.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: BBQ and Boils in the Bayou
programme.desc: Roger Mooking visits the Louisiana bayou for barbecue, brunch and a crawfish boil. In Prairieville, L.A., he helps a husband-and-wife team of caterers prepare baby back ribs, brisket and 200 pounds of live crawfish.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fiery Couples
programme.desc: From live-fire cooking to low-and-slow barbecue, Roger Mooking meets up with two couples making fiery feasts and creating sparks in California.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Backyard BBQ Blowouts
programme.desc: Roger Mooking drops in at two backyard cookouts where the smoke is thick and the fires are hot. He helps guest chef Jeremy Conner prepare a fish roast at renowned bed and breakfast Maison Madeleine in Breaux Bridge, L.A.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Lighting Up Louisiana
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is in Louisiana, where smoked meat makes an appearance in many classic Cajun dishes. He meets Chef Nathanial Zimet, who serves North Carolina-style smoked whole hog in po' boy sandwiches at Bourree in New Orleans.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Florida Heat
programme.desc: Roger Mooking cruises the Florida coastline for two fiery cookouts that bring the heat. First, he visits Chef Marcel Vizcarra, owner of modern Peruvian eatery Llama Restaurant in St. Augustine, Fla.

programme.title: Good Eats: Soups On
programme.desc: Chef/Scientist Alton Brown serves up soup that children of all ages will love.

programme.title: Good Eats: The Big Chili
programme.desc: Join Host and cowpoke Gerald P Hobbs (Alton Brown) and his sidekick Rusty as they rustle up a good, honest bowl of red. Along the way, they'll ponder the chili mythology, grind up their own chili powder (that's chili with an i) and do some serious work.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Suitcase Switcheroo / More Cowbell for Bob
programme.desc: When Bob mixes up his suitcase with another traveler, the pugs head to Spain on a mission to retrieve it. Then, Bob can't find his signature instrument for the reunion of his high school rock band.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Great Shirt Rescue / A Pugatastic Day with Grandma
programme.desc: When Bob loses his lucky shirt before an important meeting, the pups stage a heist to get it back. The pugs are left at Bob's mother's house when he goes out of town.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Hiccup Hazard/ The Great Robot Race
programme.desc: Pip’s hiccups threaten their delivery so he asks Freddy to do the impossible: scare them out of him. Pip and Freddy have to prove that delivery birds are better than a stork drone.

programme.title: Movie: Puss in Boots
programme.desc: Chronicles the events that occurred in Puss's life before he met up with Shrek.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Tour Bus/ Game Show
programme.desc: When Alvin talks Dave into buying a used tour bus, Dave has no idea of the problems ahead. Alvin signs the Chipmunks up for a game show that forces losing contestants to perform dangerous stunts.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Alvin Management/ Time Capsule
programme.desc: When Alvin accuses Dave of yelling at him too much, a therapist moves in to help Dave control his anger. When the school digs up an old high school time capsule, Miss Smith and Dave work together to keep an old secret.

programme.title: It's Pony: Dad's Speech/ School Dance
programme.desc: Annie tries to help Dad work through his stage fright by encouraging him to be more like Pony. Everyone is dreading the Valentine's school dance, so Annie and Pony try to get it cancelled.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Certifiable Super Sitter
programme.desc: Chloe meets Poof for the first time when he comes home from school on Spring Break. Cosmo and Wanda win a free French Dinner, so Chloe gets to babysit Poof and his friends. All goes well until Vicky shows up.

programme.title: Movie: Splitting Adam
programme.desc: A teen stumbles upon a cloning machine and makes multiple copies of himself to tackle all of his problems.

programme.title: The Loud House: For Bros About to Rock/ It's a Loud, Loud, Loud, Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln is going to his first rock concert, and Luna is determined to make it the greatest experience ever.

programme.title: The Loud House: Toads and Tiaras/ Two Boys and a Baby
programme.desc: After Lola gets sick and can't compete in her pageant, Lincoln coaches Lana to take her place. Thinking it'll be easy, Lincoln and Clyde babysit Lily.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Mexican Makeover/ Uptown Funk
programme.desc: With Mama Lupe coming to visit, Abuela tries to make sure her family represents their culture perfectly. Adelaide and Carl must work together on an adventure on Mr. Chang's route.

programme.title: The Loud House: Cover Girls/ Save the Date
programme.desc: All 10 of Lincoln's sisters ask him to cover for them on the same day. Bobby and Lori go on a double date with Lincoln and Ronnie Anne.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Barnacle Face/ Pet Sitter Pat
programme.desc: The night before the big school dance, Mr. Krabs asks SpongeBob to help Pearl get rid of a barnacle on her face.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Patrick Smartpants/ SquidBob Tentaclepants
programme.desc: A knock on the head gives Patrick superior intellect, and Spongebob and Squidward accidentally get melded into one body when Sandy's teleportation machine malfunctions.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Fear of a Krabby Patty/ Shell of a Man
programme.desc: SpongeBob develops a fear of Krabby Patties; Mr. Krab molts his shell before a reunion.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: That Sinking Feeling/ Karate Star
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick dig a tunnel between their two houses and drive Squidward nuts.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Drive Thru/ The Hot Shot
programme.desc: Instead of paying to patch up a hole in the wall, Mr. Krabs decides to use it to make more money by turning it into a drive-thru window. Tony Fast, Jr., the son of a famous race car driver, teaches SpongeBob how to drive.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob's Last Stand
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick protest the construction of a highway that would destroy Jellyfish Fields.

programme.title: It's Pony: Plants/ Heston's Coat
programme.desc: When Annie and Pony plan a camping trip, Pony becomes afraid of plants. Then, Heston loans Annie his new coat, but Annie knows Pony will ruin it.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Yours, Mine and Mine/ Kracked Krabs
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick buy a toy and have to learn to share it.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Greasy Buffoons/ Model Sponge
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs and Plankton woo customers with greasy entrees. SpongeBob tries a career at being a model in a kitchen sponge commercial.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Inmates of Summer
programme.desc: Patrick and SpongeBob make a big mistake when they board a ship that is full of prisoners.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: No Hat for Pat/ Toy Store of Doom
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs offers Patrick a job as a sign-holder. SpongeBob and Patrick spend the night locked in a toy store.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: No Weenies Allowed/ Squilliam Returns
programme.desc: SpongeBob tries to get into the Salty Spitoon; Squidward's old rival comes to town.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mall Girl Pearl/ Two Thumbs Down
programme.desc: Pearl gets a job to be cool like her friends, but the only store that's hiring is the lamest store at the mall. SpongeBob loses the use of his thumbs, and must get them back in working order before his entire life falls apart.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob LongPants/ Larry's Gym
programme.desc: SpongeBob gets a pair of long pants, but they change his life in unexpected ways.When Larry the Lobster opens a new gym in Bikini Bottom, SpongeBob becomes his best customer.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Krusty Krushers/ The Card
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick become wrestlers as part of Mr. Krab's newest get-rich quick scheme.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Gramma's Secret Recipe/ The Cent of Money
programme.desc: Plankton disguises himself as SpongeBob's grandmother.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Rise of the Turtles
programme.desc: When Splinter allows his teenage sons, the Mutant Ninja Turtles, to visit the surface for the first time, they discover that the surface world isn't as simple as it first appears.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Turtle Temper
programme.desc: Raphael loses his temper when he is insulted by a New Yorker named Vic.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: New Friend, Old Enemy
programme.desc: Michelangelo tries to prove humans can be friends with Turtles.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: I Think His Name Is Baxter Stockman
programme.desc: The Turtles battle Baxter, a derange inventor on their way to see a movie.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Metalhead
programme.desc: Donatello creates a remote-controlled robot turtle to fight in his place.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Monkey Brains
programme.desc: Donatello and April uncover a conspiracy involving a psychic monkey.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Never Say Xever

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: World Day/ Between a Rope and a Hard Place
programme.desc: To celebrate 'World Day' and win a trip, the Chipmunks each get a country to represent for a school presentation. Then, Coach Dobkins kicks Cheesy and Theodore off the track team for being slow, but Theodore is determined to compete.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Mutiny/ Reality or Not
programme.desc: Desperate to avenge last year's loss, The Chipmunks argue over who is best suited to lead them to victory. Later, Alvin is tired of seeing his celebrity status overshadowed by Reality TV stars. So, he decides to become one.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Members Only/ The New Kid
programme.desc: Alvin helps the mathletes stand up to the school bullies, but in the process they become bullies themselves. Alvin befriends a lonely new kid in school, but Theodore discovers the new student may not be who he says he is.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Good Luck Mr. Whiskers/ Who's Your Daddy
programme.desc: Theodore is convinced that Miss Croner's missing cat is the cause of a terrible curse. When Dave comes down with a bad cold, Alvin quickly offers to take over Dad duty.

programme.title: Unleashed: Got to Be Kitten Me!
programme.desc: Impressive animal acts compete for the title of 'Most Entertaining Pet.'

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Fairy Idol
programme.desc: Norm the genie is sick and tired of his lamp and wants to get out of the business. When he learns that any magical creature can apply for a fairy godparent posting if someone quits, he schemes to get Cosmo and Wanda to give up their jobs.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Mighty Mom and Dyno Dad/ Knighty Knight
programme.desc: Timmy gives Mom and Dad superpowers; Timmy wishes he could go to the real Middle Ages.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Whittle Me This/ Mayor May Not

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Dinklescouts/ I Dream of Cosmo
programme.desc: Timmy wishes Mr. Dinkleberg would replace Dad as Squirrely Scout leader. Dad tries to regain Timmy's respect and his leader position.

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger: Popcorn Monster/ Game of Drones

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger: Clone Babies/ Flying Spiders
