programme.desc: King confides in a carnival fortune teller who makes his dream come true, but it comes at a cost.

programme.desc: Candace tries to bust Phineas and Ferb when they put on an enormous backyard magic show. Vanessa and Major Monogram's son, Monty, get coffee together.

programme.desc: Buford removes a part from a tire swing the boys are building and it accidentally shoots a ray that turns Candace into a fly. Meanwhile, Doofenshmirtz is suffering from Evil Scientist’s block.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Desserted/ The Gifted
programme.desc: Cricket treats his family to dinner, but Bill is suspicious about how he plans to pay for it. Tilly and Cricket battle to see if Bill lies about liking their Father's Day gifts.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Greens' Acres/ Dolled Up
programme.desc: Young Bill will do whatever it takes to keep the family farm in business. When Tilly and Nancy celebrate Saxon's birthday at a fancy doll store, they set their sights on a seat next to Cantaloupe Sinclair, the tea party's posh VIP.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Harvest Dinner/ Winner Winner

programme.title: Big City Greens: Urban Legend/ Wishing Well
programme.desc: When Bill learns that Gramma has been purposely creating a frightening reputation around town, he throws a barbeque to befriend the neighbors. Cricket makes a wishing well to cash in on people making wishes.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Fill Bill/ Critterball Crisis

programme.title: Big City Greens: Tilly Tour/ Dinner Party
programme.desc: Tilly takes Gramma out to be a tourist for a day. Cricket and Remy arrange a dinner party for everyone to get to know each other.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Shark Objects / Dream Weaver

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket's Place/ Volunteer Tilly
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of a boy whose curiosity and enthusiasm lead him on journeys.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Garage Tales/ Animal Farm

programme.title: Big City Greens: Skunked/ Axin' Saxon

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Watch Over Me
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a navy officer with the highest level top secret clearance who was recently assigned as a tech liaison with a private developer. Also, Pride transforms the carport into an auto shop.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Love Hurts
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a petty officer found in a Mardi Gras float storage facility with an engagement ring and proposal plan in hand. However, the case takes a mysterious turn when the team is unable to locate his supposed girlfriend.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Chasing Ghosts
programme.desc: After a stolen navy-issued gun is found to belong to a Chief Petty officer who died 40 years ago, the team reopens the cold case, one that Wade has tracked and investigated for years. Also, the team prepares for their annual Thanksgiving dinner together.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Checkmate, Part II

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Musician Heal Thyself
programme.desc: A case turns personal for Pride when the body of a petty officer is identified as a former gang member he once mentored. Meanwhile, Brody continues her search for the perfect place to call home in New Orleans.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Carrier
programme.desc: NCIS Special Agent Tony DiNozzo assists the New Orleans team when a Navy lieutenant on leave dies of the bubonic plague. The team races to locate all additional sailors on liberty, control a potential outbreak and determine the source of the disease.

programme.desc: When a woman returns home to Tennessee two weeks before Christmas to take care of her niece and nephew while their parents are away, the last thing she expects is to reconnect with her childhood best friend.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Horror at the Campground
programme.desc: A family camping trip to the remote Idaho mountains turns into something out of a horror movie when two-year-old DeOrr Kunz disappears. At first it looks like he may have been abducted, until other disturbing theories start to emerge.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Night of No Return
programme.desc: Lauren Spierer went for a night out with friends in June 2011. The college coed has never been seen since. But years later, the mystery deepens when another female student from the same university is found dead after another night on the town.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Mom of Three Vanished
programme.desc: Beautiful mom Michelle Parker appears on an episode of' The People’s Court', fighting with her ex-fiancé over a luxury, diamond engagement ring. But hours after that episode airs, Michelle mysteriously vanishes.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Deadly Hotel Check-In
programme.desc: College student Elisa Lam checks into a Los Angeles hotel, but never checks out. The last known images of the tourist are from the hotel’s elevator security camera. Nearly 2 weeks later, her naked body is found floating in the hotel's rooftop water tank.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pastoral Care
programme.desc: The body of a female prison guard shows up in a landfill and investigators suspect the hundreds of prisoners in the facility where she worked.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bagging a Killer
programme.desc: Police use satellites to trace the kidnapper of a nine-year-old girl. After questioning whether the girl's long lost mother was somehow involved, the satellite tracking reveals who the kidnapper is, where they took her, and why.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Clutch of Witnesses
programme.desc: Two eyewitnesses see a truck intentionally drive over a sleeping man outside a motorcycle gang's clubhouse. During the investigation the witnesses, the truck, and the body disappear, leaving police just one clue: a bloodstain in the snow.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Scout's Honor
programme.desc: Police determine that the human remains found in a discarded box belong to one Edna Posey. But to find out whether the man accused of the crime is guilty, investigators turn to insects and the forensic entomologist who can interpret their behavior.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Church Disappearance
programme.desc: When a girl disappears from church, investigators fear a stalker is preying on children.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Photo Finish
programme.desc: A beautiful model goes missing and no one has a clue to her whereabouts until a park employee discovers photographs in a trash dumpster. With the photos are some vital pieces of information which eventually lead to a professional photographer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bad Blood
programme.desc: A young doctor in a rural community is accused of sedating and sexually assaulting two of his female patients. DNA tests demonstrate that the doctor is innocent, but the women continue to insist that he sedated and raped them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pure Evil
programme.desc: In 1993, two Texas teenagers, a 14-year-old boy and his 13-year-old stepsister, were brutally murdered. It took forensic evidence and a behavioral profile to identify their killer as Jason Massey, who had a history of torturing animals.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Naked Justice
programme.desc: The 29-year-old, pregnant wife of a young, successful attorney is found dead in her Michigan home of a gunshot wound to the head. Blood spatter analysis and a painstaking investigation led police to the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Treading Not So Lightly
programme.desc: When a four-year-old girl is found unconscious in a parking lot, police concluded it was a hit and run vehicle accident, and left it at that. But the girl's mother was determined to find out exactly what had happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cement the Case
programme.desc: A man confesses to killing his wife, but forensic evidence may lead to another suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Innocence Lost
programme.desc: Five-year-old Melissa Brannen disappeared from a Christmas party in 1989. The fibers on her clothes were the only means for police to determine her abductor.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Forever Hold Your Peace
programme.desc: When a young man confessed to the rape and murder of a woman in a restaurant, police were convinced the case was solved. Eight years later, another man imprisoned for an unrelated crime, admitted he committed the murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Reel Danger
programme.desc: When two young boys are viciously attacked while fishing in a nearby pond, authorities suspect a group of teenage thugs, but lack solid evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Accident or Murder?

programme.title: Storage Wars: Auction Boogaloo
programme.desc: The buyers welcome Rene and Casey back to the auctions with a healthy dose of badgering and competition. Dave heats things up and finds a piece of board game history. Darrell and Brandon show their moves outside of the auctions.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Locktoberfest!
programme.desc: Darrell and Brandon return to the site of their biggest score while the other buyers are focused on taking down the self-proclaimed 'King of Montebello.' Jarrod and Brandi land a locker that leads them to something called a 'Herbmeister.'

programme.title: Storage Wars: My Little Brony
programme.desc: The buyers head south to Oceanside, CA, which is Rene's backyard and he intends to make the competition pay for coming to his territory. Jarrod and Brandi discover that friendship can be magic and profitable.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Up the Ante in El Monte
programme.desc: An auction in El Monte, CA has big lockers which means big money. Dave nabs a unit that shows he knows how to party and Rene tries to slice a bit of profit from a chilling find.

programme.title: Storage Wars: All Along the Swatchtower
programme.desc: The buyers throw down in Koreatown. Dave expects to score some high-end merchandise, while Darrell struggles as he's never been to this area before. Mary fights for her lockers, and Jarrod may just push Brandi over the edge.

programme.title: Storage Wars: A San Marcos Mitzvah
programme.desc: An auction in San Marcos brings Darrell and Brandon to their home turf and Mary finds a way to deal with inflated prices.

programme.title: Storage Wars: North Hollywood Hustle
programme.desc: The competition becomes fierce in North Hollywood and even Dan and Laura can't escape the tension. Dave scores a locker that may be a hit and Rene fights past the local buyers to have some fun.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Who Let the Daves Out
programme.desc: The buyers hit a vault auction in Huntington Beach where Dave decides to bring a few friends to help him out. Mary struggles to win a vault and keep her inexperience under wraps.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Lock and Roll
programme.desc: An auction in Mission Hills brings new challenges as Ivy changes his game and goes for a locker with collectables. Mary just tries to land something that will give her a quick sale.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Gambler of Thrones
programme.desc: The buyers head out to Palm Springs for an auction that brings sweet lockers and big money finds. Mary is worried that they area may be too high society for her, while Ivy sets his sights on vintage items.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Too Fast, Too Curious
programme.desc: Dave finds something that has him baffled while Ivy attempts an elusive strategy to make a score.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Once Upon a Locker in the West
programme.desc: The buyers head to Santa Ana, CA where dreams of great lockers spice up the auction. Jarrod and Brandi get a locker that leads to the sweet life while Mary tries to get something more collectable.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Locker Mountain High
programme.desc: The auctions begin in Upland, California, but Dan and Laura take the buyers on a wild ride to finish out the day. Ivy ends up with an eyeful, and Mary buys early in hopes of treasure.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Fontan-o-rama

programme.title: Hoarders: Andy and Becky
programme.desc: Andy and Becky feel it is their constitutional right to live however they choose, even if that's among 250 tons of hoard. Now they're in a battle with the city government that could end in them going to jail and losing their home.

programme.title: Hoarders: Dale
programme.desc: Over the past three decades, Dale has hoarded his Alaskan property with everything from decking from the Yukon River Bridge to more than 100 vehicles. With a harsh Alaskan winter quickly approaching, he must clean up or face perishing this winter.

programme.desc: Becky has hoarded her home and motel property with furniture, clothes and appliances. Now, she's hoarded herself out of the lives of her children, grandchildren, and her husband.

programme.desc: A couple sets out to make life difficult for each other after a wild time in Vegas.

programme.title: Movie: Salt
programme.desc: A highly regarded CIA agent, accused of being a Russian spy by a defector, goes on the run to protect her husband. The agent's superiors refuse to believe she's leading a double life until her actions begin to raise doubts.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: The guys turn on the charm to make a restaurant basement sound enticing and recruit unsuspecting shoppers to shout out bizarre nicknames. Then, tonight's big loser must find his way out of the cuckoo's nest before the chicks get crazy.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Autograph Corrector
programme.desc: The guys rely on the kindness of strangers to help answer some awkward questions, then go looking for love in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser strikes out amongst baseball fans with an assist from Yankees legend Tino Martinez.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Eggplant Parm Episode
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Sal and Joe dish out some wild stories with actress Jillian Bell and devour the perfect parmigiana cooked by Chef Dom Dibartolomeo.

programme.title: Top Secret Videos: Evaluation Session
programme.desc: The Interns of the NSA suffer through their worst fear: a randomized evaluation test administered by the mysterious higher-ups.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Take Me Out at the Ballgame
programme.desc: Find out how Murr chose which guys to honk at Volcano Bay, what happened to the TP used in the stock boy shootout, and how Joe stayed safe after messing with NY Mets fans at Citi Field.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Make Womb for Daddy
programme.desc: Find out who scored free sandwiches while shooting at Blimpie; what classic game inspired the 'Guess What' challenge; and what was worse for Q than the pain he endured during his 'childbirth' punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Show Stopper
programme.desc: Learn who was the most excited to film at Universal Studios and why the guys decided against posing as security guards. Plus, take a look at the exciting costumes the guys originally planned for a challenge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Q-Pay
programme.desc: Find out which joker has a weak spot for animals that the other guys love to exploit, who made the best wingman back in his single days and how long it took Q to grow out his hair long enough for a wig.

programme.title: The Misery Index: They Didn't Blur the Dog!
programme.desc: Find out why animals should never drive, and which NSYNC star makes a surprise appearance.

programme.title: The Misery Index: Send in the Clowns
programme.desc: See a moped crash that'd make Wylie Coyote proud, a big family surprise for one Tenderloin, and Murr makes a very bad bet.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Remember the Pact
programme.desc: Find out how many mousetraps accidentally went off during Q's turn in 'hold this please,' what made Joe and Murr join 'team skins' in Columbus park, and how Murr's tech punishment made show history.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Sneaking Number Twos, Going Number One
programme.desc: Find out why the jokers love filming at the grocery store, how many pencils were purchased for put-pocketing and why Sal's pee punishment was twice as terrible as it looked.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Card Against Humanity
programme.desc: Find out which Jokers really wear glasses, how Q was injured the last time he wore his talking brush disguise and what Sal's sole business card actually says.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Guy Cooks the Games

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Keepin' It Real
programme.desc: In Miami, Florida, the Asian fusion spot delivers the bomb dot com brussels sprouts, and goes all out ducky on the sous vide sammie.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Roadtrippin
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's headed coast to coast, from north to south. In Somers Point, N.J., he meets up with Rachael vs. Guy Kids Cookoff contestant Gibson Borelli at the local legend dishin' out righteous crab-stuffed flounder.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Authentic to Inventive
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is divin' into dishes from real deal to really creative. In Portland, OR, a 70-year-old icon is serving up authentic recipes from the chef's Chinese hometown, and a jammin' joint in Oklahoma City is getting groovy with chicken and biscuits.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: International Intrigue
programme.desc: Guy grabs some Thai noodles, curry and green papaya salad in Dallas. In Miami he visits a Lating place for empanadas and a unique plantain sandwich.

programme.title: Christmas Cookie Challenge: Bright Lights, Big Cookies
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson challenges five talented cookie makers to flex their skills with classic cookie cutters, using them to make dazzling designs that have nothing to do with the cutters' original shapes.

programme.desc: Eddie Jackson invites five of America's finest cookie makers to take on the world of fine art by assembling spectacular cookie mosaics. Judges Ree Drummond, Dwayne Ingraham and Gesine Prado decide if all the pieces fall into place.

programme.title: Christmas Cookie Challenge: Christmas Mischief
programme.desc: There's no hiding when Eddie Jackson tasks five of America's best cookie makers with creating Christmas character masks made of cookies. Judges Vivian Chan, Ree Drummond and Dan Langan decide which masks are marvelous.

programme.title: Christmas Cookie Challenge: Christmas Vacation
programme.desc: Five fantastic cookie makers enter the workshop, but instead of a winter wonderland, they find host Eddie Jackson lounging in a beach chair under a palm tree. The bakers are challenged to create cookies perfect for a Christmas in the tropics.

programme.title: Giada's Holiday Handbook: Holiday Kick-Off Brunch
programme.desc: Giada kicks off the holiday season with a buffet brunch that features the flavors and ingredients of autumn. Her menu includes bacon cranberry scones with citrus basil butter, sweet potato and kale Spanish frittata and smoked salmon waffles.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Get Your Fit On
programme.desc: Starting the day right is a spicy turkey merguez scramble, roasted chickpeas and avocado, followed by a tasty take on peanut butter and jelly cream of wheat.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like A Pro: Salads For Four Seasons
programme.desc: Ina Garten is sharing her pro tips for sensational salads for every season. For an all-in-one spring dinner, her crispy mustard chicken and frisee salad is unbeatable, and tarragon shrimp salad is perfect for an easy and delicious summer lunch.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Reinventing Fall Foods
programme.desc: In an effort to shake up traditional takes on fall foods, Valerie Bertinelli treats her guests, Chef Ludo Lefebvre, his wife, Krissy, and their 8-year-old twins, to a super special day-after brunch filled with seasonal treats for a long holiday weekend.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Dinner on the Grill
programme.desc: Ree Drummond makes a Mexican-inspired family dinner on the grill, and Ladd pitches in with the cooking. The main course is a Drummond favorite, marinated Carne Asada, teamed up with skewers of juicy Chipotle Glazed Shrimp.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Cleaning Out The Fridge
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is cleaning out her fridge and using up food that's on its way out. She's turning milk and cream into a wonderful lemon rice pudding with leftover lemons, while the produce drawer is transformed into a cool, delicious fridge gazpacho.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Cowboy Drive-Through
programme.desc: Ree serves up sensational packed lunches at the Drummond drive-through. She makes ranch hand sandwiches with pop pulled pork and fixins, spicy sweet potato chips, a cowboy fruit salad and triple-chocolate cow pies.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Alex Is Home!
programme.desc: Alex is home from college and the cousins are getting together for a street taco feast. There's Texas braised beef in honour of her college state and ranch chicken to pile into tacos, along with an avocado lime crema, and devilishly good salsa diablo.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Comfort is Queen
programme.desc: Molly Yeh shares her favorite cozy recipes, like succulent Meatball-Stuffed Biscuits and Knoephla Soup full of chewy dumplings. She also loves her Tomato Squash Soup, creamy Spinach and Artichoke Chicken Casserole and flaky Spinach and Feta Rugelach.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Bret's Graduation
programme.desc: Trisha creates food for a graduation party, including green bean casserole, cheesy country ham dip, and paprika chicken.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Best of Barefoot Comfort: Favorite Flavors
programme.desc: Ina Garten revisits her most-flavorful recipes, starting with Vanilla Rum Panna Cotta with Salted Caramel. Parmesan shines in her Orecchiette with Broccoli Rabe and Sausage, and balsamic vinegar boosts her quick Fig and Goat Cheese Toasts.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Turn Up the Volume
programme.desc: Ina Garten is turning up the volume on flavour, starting with the creamy hummus she pairs with her chunky Israeli vegetable salad.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Fall for Your Pantry
programme.desc: The Kitchen hosts fall in love with the pantry thanks to seasonal dishes using pantry staples. Katie Lee starts things off with her chicken bolognese using a secret ingredient that stumps all the hosts, evaporated milk.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Plenty of Gratitude
programme.desc: For the pre-heat, the eight bakers work in teams to make four different kinds of pies. In the main heat, the bakers embrace the stuffed feeling after the Thanksgiving meal by making stuffed cakes featuring seasonal ingredients.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Turkey Day Delights
programme.desc: In the pre-heat, seven bakers must make a dessert combining cranberry with another flavour of the season. The main heat challenges the bakers to create a sweet treat that pairs coffee with an unusual flavour of coffee syrup.

programme.title: Genndy Tartakovsky's Primal: Slave of the Scorpion

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Cheer Up Sleepy Gene
programme.desc: Gene gets invited to his first sleepover and is nervous about it, and when things don't go as planned, he realizes he had a right to be. Meanwhile, Bob and Linda record themselves while sleeping to prove who snores more.

programme.title: Joe Pera Talks With You: Joe Pera Helps You Write
programme.desc: In which Joe and you attempt to write something meaningful.

programme.title: Joe Pera Talks With You: Joe Pera Shows You How to Do Good Fashion
programme.desc: Joe and his friend Gene take a road trip to Milwaukee, Wisconsin to find out where fashion comes from.

programme.title: Joe Pera Talks With You: Joe Pera Shows You How to Pack a Lunch
programme.desc: Joe attempts to pack the perfect lunch with you on the last night of summer before school begins.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Colors of Raven/ The Left Leg
programme.desc: Raven splits into five different versions of herself, each with its own personality; If Robin is forced to be the left leg in Cyborg's new giant robot, he is going to make it the best body part there is.

programme.title: Bakugan: Battle Planet: The Tokyo Catastrophe/ Bakugan Battle League Finale
programme.desc: Haavik has highjacked the Bakugan Battle league – Tokyo Edition! / Haavik unleashes an army of unruly Bakugan to bring his own brand of chaos and destruction to the city of Tokyo. It’s all hands-on-deck to stop the invasion, and foil Haavik’s plot.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Books/ Lazy Sunday

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Parasite/ Starliar

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Meatball Party/ Staff Meeting

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Terra-ized/ Artful Dodgers
programme.desc: The funny business that happens in between saving the world and being teenagers.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Power Moves/ Staring at the Future
programme.desc: Robin gets carried away when he and Cyborg start merging their powers and technology; Cyborg and Beast Boy have a staring contest that lasts 30 years.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: No Power/ Sidekick

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Caged Tiger/ Nose Mouth

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Legs/ Breakfast Cheese
programme.desc: The funny business that happens in between saving the world and being teenagers.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Web

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Nuisance

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Lady

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Best

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Sucker

programme.title: Roseanne: Two Down, One to Go
programme.desc: Darlene is going away to college in Chicago and, as a result, Roseanne is faced with saying goodbye to another daughter. In the hope of keeping Darlene from moving, David makes a last minute attempt and proposes marriage.

programme.title: Roseanne: Party Politics
programme.desc: Roseanne suspects that Darlene and DJ are teaming up against her. Fred attempts to win Jackie back.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: I Scream When I Pee
programme.desc: Alan's smokin' hot, famous ex-wife, Kandi, wants him back. Meanwhile, Berta isn't interested in celebrating her birthday, so Walden helps make it special.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: One Nut Johnson
programme.desc: Alan helps Walden create a new identity in order to find a woman who isn't just after his money.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Give Santa a Tail-Hole

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Grab a Feather and Get in Line

programme.desc: The African penguin colony welcome their newest additions after a successful mating season. Sea otter Mara is introduced to the rest of the raft, and the wild bottlenose dolphin population in Florida is examined.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Expedition Whale Shark
programme.desc: Aquarium staff travel to the remote island of St. Helena to gain footage of whale sharks in their natural habitat during mating season. Spotted ribbontail ray Francis is introduced to her new tank friends, and Cerbie the seal is treated for joint pain.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: A First for Dr. Jeff
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff performs a surgery he'd never done before on a dog with labored breathing. A senior canine was abandoned by his owner and the staff must find him a new forever home, while neglected ornate box turtles are saved by Dr. Baier.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: Jeff and the Jaguar
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff and Petra train new vets at a wildlife sanctuary in Mexico. While there, they spay an endangered jaguar, and help an injured osprey. At the clinic, a Great Dane comes in with wounds after battling an air conditioner.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: Bison Wranglers
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff discovers a large mass on a loveable canine. Dr. Don helps Kelly the vet tech with her dog's sun-damaged nose, while Dr. Baier and Hector join forces to treat wild bison.

programme.title: Mega Zoo: Moving Day Dilemma
programme.desc: Keepers become concerned when the big move for lion brothers Lwazi and Ato is delayed. Young rhino Kifaru is challenged during a mating ritual, and a brilliant plan saves the endangered mountain pygmy possums.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Bongo Love Story
programme.desc: Trouble ensues when the time comes to pair Chester's newest bongo couple, Safi and Moti. A trio of silver-eared mesia chicks must find a way to survive when a fierce storm destroys their nest, and Gentle George the Malagasy giant rat faces surgery.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: Bison Wranglers
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff discovers a large mass on a loveable canine. Dr. Don helps Kelly the vet tech with her dog's sun-damaged nose, while Dr. Baier and Hector join forces to treat wild bison.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: Mission Beyond
programme.desc: With thousands of animals in need, and vet care unaffordable to most, Dr. Jeff and his team head to Mexico to run a mobile clinic and help as many people and pets as they can.

programme.title: Mega Zoo: Moving Day Dilemma
programme.desc: Keepers become concerned when the big move for lion brothers Lwazi and Ato is delayed. Young rhino Kifaru is challenged during a mating ritual, and a brilliant plan saves the endangered mountain pygmy possums.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Baby Rhino Due Date
programme.desc: Eastern black rhino Kitani is due to give birth, and help swell the ranks of this endangered species. However, with Kitani having lost three previous calves, it's a worrying time. Keepers are concerned that things aren't going to plan.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: Sioux Journey
programme.desc: When a beloved dog needs knee surgery, Doctor Jeff may be his only hope. The clinic helps three sugar gliders with an attitude problem. And Dr. Jeff takes his mobile clinic to South Dakota to help animals in need on a Native American reservation.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: Turning Point
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff faces the challenge of his life when he learns that he has a serious medical issue. Despite this, he tackles complex surgery on a puppy with internal bleeding. Then, when a young dog is hit by a car, the team races to fix her badly broken leg.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Dirty Habits
programme.desc: Parker investigates a rotting bear carcass that was dumped on the side of the road, leading him on a hunt across Maine to find a potential poacher. Blanchard catches a couple behaving badly on a wildlife refuge. Robertson rescues some ducklings.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Catcher in the Wild
programme.desc: A speeding dirt biker eludes Warden Robertson, but leaves a crucial clue to his whereabouts. Two dogs on the loose are chasing newborn deer. An ATV accident victim has an odd explanation for what caused his crash.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Can't Believe Your Eyes
programme.desc: Whether it's protecting wildlife or ensuring public safety, the Maine Game Wardens are on double duty during the summer. Warden Jeremy Judd tries to rescue a baby skunk in distress. Wardens MacCabe and Robertson investigate a stolen ATV that disappeared.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Truth or Consequences
programme.desc: In New Hampshire, Officer Glen Lucas investigates a dispute between a turkey hunter and an eyewitness. Sergeant Todd Szewczyk hunts down a trespassing target shooter and Officers McKee and Matson fish for the truth from trespassing ATV riders.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Protect and Preserve: No Room for Error
programme.desc: Officer Lopashanski makes a surprising discovery while searching an island for an injured bald eagle. Officers Cheney and Pushee stumble upon a trespasser whose vehicle is stuck in a mud hole.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Protect and Preserve: Bait and Switch
programme.desc: McKee and Pushee confront two hunters lying about illegally baiting deer, Officer Arsenault deals with a tight-lipped teenage fisherman who refuses to provide any information and Lt. Boudreau stumbles upon a couple in a compromising position.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Protect and Preserve: Nothing to Hide
programme.desc: Officer Jim Cyrs and Lt. Saunders rush to the scene of an ATV accident. Officer James Benvenuti works with K-9 Cora to track down a suspect. Officer Eric Hannett gets backup from Lieutenant Bill Boudreau when dealing with a suspicious fisherman.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Midsummer Mayhem
programme.desc: Officer Holmes and trainee Frye respond to an ATV accident in which a man's head has been run over. Officer McKee helps relocate a rare rattlesnake. Officer Courtney assists a dog locked inside a car. On Mt. Willard, a collapsed student needs rescuing.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Protect and Preserve: Schoolyard Bear
programme.desc: Officer Chris McKee attempts to remove a bear from a tree in a playground, while Officer Fluette picks out his new K9 partner. Officer Lucas searches for a group of ATVs. On the snowy summit of Mt. Washington, officers search for lost hikers.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Coastal Criminals
programme.desc: Officer James Benvenuti chases down two lobster poachers in Rye. In a puzzling case, Officer Graham Courtney investigates a man on the beach found covered in blood. And Sergeant Adam Cheney attempts to apprehend trespassers on the railroad tracks.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Jungles
programme.desc: Jungles cover roughly three per cent of our planet yet contain 50 per cent of the world's species. In the Ngogo forest, the largest chimpanzee group defends its territory from neighbouring groups. Other specialists include a parasitic fungi.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Shallow Seas
programme.desc: A humpback whale mother and calf embark on a journey from tropical coral paradises to storm-ravaged polar seas. Indonesian coral reefs reveal seahorses, clams and sea kraits. Bull fur seals attack king penguins, and sea urchins fell forests of kelp.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Seasonal Forests
programme.desc: From the evergreen forests of the frozen north to the deciduous dry forests of the Equator, discover the greatest woodlands on Earth.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Ocean Deep
programme.desc: In the ocean, life goes to extraordinary lengths to survive this immense realm. A 30-tonne whale shark gorges on a school of fish. Deep sea octopus fly in the abyss and vampire squid use bioluminescence to create a colour display.

programme.title: Earth's Great Seasons: Spring
programme.desc: Celebrate spring on planet Earth, and learn about the extraordinary tricks that animals and plants find to rise to the new challenges it brings.

programme.title: Planet Earth: From Pole to Pole
programme.desc: The ultimate portrait of our planet looks at the key factors that shape our natural history. In the Arctic spring, a mother polar bear and cubs have two weeks to cross the frozen sea. Time-lapse cameras capture the transformation created by floods.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Mountains
programme.desc: A tour of the mountain ranges reveals how animals rise to the challenge of mountain life. The snow leopard finds habitat in the largest glaciers of the world.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Fresh Water
programme.desc: Follow the descent of rivers from their mountain sources to the sea. Witness unique and dramatic moments of animal behaviour, including a piranha frenzy and a showdown between otters and crocodiles.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Caves
programme.desc: Although often overlooked, caves are remarkable habitats with equally bizarre wildlife. This documentary provides a unique access to a hidden world of stalactites, stalagmites, snotites and troglodytes that brings a wealth of surprises.

programme.title: Earth's Great Seasons: Spring
programme.desc: Celebrate spring on planet Earth, and learn about the extraordinary tricks that animals and plants find to rise to the new challenges it brings.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Deserts
programme.desc: Deserts cover one fifth of the planet and they are spreading every year. We think we are familiar with the Sahara and the Kalahari but what about the Gobi or the Atacama -so many deserts have hardly been explored.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Ice Worlds
programme.desc: The Arctic and Antarctic experience the most extreme seasons on Earth. Time-lapse cameras watch a colony of penguins, while aerial images show a polar bear swimming more than 100 km.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Great Plains
programme.desc: After filming for three years, the shy Mongolian gazelle and the bizarre-looking Tibetan fox are captured on film. Over six weeks, the team follows a pride of 30 lions as they attempt to hunt elephants.

programme.title: Hidden Habitats: Scottish Highlands
programme.desc: The Scottish Highlands are considered one of the last truly wild places in the UK. Since the Ice Age, the Highland landscape has undergone a transformation from dense forest to open space.

programme.title: Wild Singapore: Forest Life
programme.desc: An exploration of Singapore's forests, which are home to some of the least known primates in the world, flying dragons, mating snakes, and many more.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Jungles
programme.desc: Jungles cover roughly three per cent of our planet yet contain 50 per cent of the world's species. In the Ngogo forest, the largest chimpanzee group defends its territory from neighbouring groups. Other specialists include a parasitic fungi.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Shallow Seas
programme.desc: A humpback whale mother and calf embark on a journey from tropical coral paradises to storm-ravaged polar seas. Indonesian coral reefs reveal seahorses, clams and sea kraits. Bull fur seals attack king penguins, and sea urchins fell forests of kelp.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Seasonal Forests
programme.desc: From the evergreen forests of the frozen north to the deciduous dry forests of the Equator, discover the greatest woodlands on Earth.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Ocean Deep
programme.desc: In the ocean, life goes to extraordinary lengths to survive this immense realm. A 30-tonne whale shark gorges on a school of fish. Deep sea octopus fly in the abyss and vampire squid use bioluminescence to create a colour display.

programme.title: Movie: I Am Number Four
programme.desc: An extraordinary young man, passing as a typical high school student, must elude an enemy who has already killed three others like him.

programme.title: Movie: Hancock
programme.desc: An alcoholic superhero, that alienates the public as he saves their lives, has a chance encounter with a public relations person.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Mystery of Skeleton Lake

programme.title: What on Earth?: The Curse of Merlin
programme.desc: The myth of Merlin is associated with an arrangement of stones in northern France, and satellite images might finally explain this ancient riddle. Investigators uncover something mysterious buried beneath the Gulf of Mexico. An island suddenly appears.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Ghost Town Terror
programme.desc: When satellites discover a strange abandoned city frozen in time, experts investigate what caused the people who lived here to disappear overnight. Using cutting-edge tech, they follow fresh leads to uncover if this mysterious city has a dark secret.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Temple of Blood
programme.desc: An ancient man-made volcano might reveal buried treasure and bloody human sacrifice. When NASA discovers a strange pattern in the Arctic ice, experts investigate if it has alien origins. A mystery in the Sahara might have a sinister explanation.

programme.desc: This episode features zip line breaks, silk fiber lamps, round balers, and comfort shoes.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Danger in Store
programme.desc: After a bad breakup, single mom Joi Partain finds love again with Jonathan Pearson. But after the couple moves to Ocala, Florida with Joi's daughter, troubles in their relationship spiral until they hit a bloody, brutal point of no return.

programme.title: See No Evil: Can I Help You?
programme.desc: In July 2013, shopkeeper Imran Ashgar is suddenly shot dead in his store in Columbus, Ohio. With the shooting caught on camera and the killers on the run, detectives are in an urgent race against time to capture them before they strike again.

programme.title: See No Evil: Happy Birthday to Drew
programme.desc: On March 27, 2017, Andrew Nesbitt is found dead on his 46th birthday in his Madison, Wisconsin apartment. With no witnesses, investigators turn to surveillance cameras in local bars, cabs, and street corners to track down his killer.

programme.title: See No Evil: A Candy Run
programme.desc: A family's nightmare begins in September 2014 when 8-year-old Hiawayi Robinson leaves her apartment to play but never returns. The desperate search to find her leads investigators to surveillance footage that sends shockwaves through the community.

programme.title: See No Evil: No Place Like Home
programme.desc: Young professional Sasha Samsudean comes home from a night out in downtown Orlando and is brutally murdered in her own apartment. Detectives must now turn to video surveillance footage to unravel the mystery and bring a cold-blooded killer to justice.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Landlady
programme.desc: The brutal murder of an elderly landlady offers no forensic answers. Detectives piece together security footage, and a motive to find their killer.

programme.title: See No Evil: It Came Back
programme.desc: When a young mother of two is found brutally murdered at home, suspicion falls on her friends. Detectives zero in on multiple suspects but as each one tells a different story; they don't know who to trust. Surveillance footage may reveal the truth.

programme.title: See No Evil: Lock Up
programme.desc: When Marcel Reardon is discovered bludgeoned to death outside an apartment building, his friends deny all knowledge of his murder. But detectives are convinced at least one of them is lying. As the net closes, the prime suspect prepares to strike again.

programme.title: See No Evil: All Eyes on Jordie
programme.desc: On April 10th 2016, Jordie Hudson vanishes after a night out with friends. The only clue police have is her glasses, which are discovered in a pool of blood. Surveillance footage shows a horrific attack.

programme.title: See No Evil: Don't Get in the Truck
programme.desc: On February 18th 2014, Emily Lambert goes missing after spending the night at a hotel bar with her new boyfriend. Two days later, she's found murdered on remote farmland. Detectives scour CCTV footage from the hotel and bar searching for her killer.

programme.title: See No Evil: Can I Help You?
programme.desc: In July 2013, shopkeeper Imran Ashgar is suddenly shot dead in his store in Columbus, Ohio. With the shooting caught on camera and the killers on the run, detectives are in an urgent race against time to capture them before they strike again.

programme.title: See No Evil: Happy Birthday to Drew
programme.desc: On March 27, 2017, Andrew Nesbitt is found dead on his 46th birthday in his Madison, Wisconsin apartment. With no witnesses, investigators turn to surveillance cameras in local bars, cabs, and street corners to track down his killer.

programme.title: Disappeared: American Gothic
programme.desc: When a bible teaching mom goes missing from her family's farm, Missouri investigators must decipher a cryptic handwritten note. They wonder if Lynn Messer was a troubled soul or the victim of foul play. A walk in the woods uncovers a mysterious skull.

programme.title: Disappeared: At the Crossroads
programme.desc: On July 7, 2007, 18-year old Jarrod Johnston walks away from his grandmother's home in Mississippi. His Dad sees similarities between his own sister's disappearance 25-years earlier and his son's. It becomes hard to hold out hope his son will ever return.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Evil Blossoms
programme.desc: When Alisha Bromfield's supervisor, Brian Cooper, promotes her to team leader she should be ecstatic. But Brian's motives are not entirely good. Alisha stands her ground with Brian, letting him know she doesn't want a relationship beyond co-workers.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Almost Home
programme.desc: Gayle Isleib was shot on April 30, 1996. Police identify a co-worker, Tyronne Montgomery. Evidence is found of stalking, plans to kidnap Gayle, murder her husband and love poems to Gayle. Tyrone Montgomery was convicted of 1st degree Murder.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Deadly Business
programme.desc: Robert Henry, an exec in Tacoma, was murdered in 1995 by a masked gunman. His wife tells the Police she thought he was killed by a former business associate. Det. Yerbury investigated and pieced together the evidence that convicted Larry Shandola.

programme.title: Who Killed Jeffrey Epstein?: Billionaire Predator
programme.desc: Reclusive billionaire Jeffrey Epstein's early years are marked by a drive to amass wealth, power, and influential friends. But in 2005, his secrets are revealed when he's accused of the sexual assault of multiple underage girls.

programme.title: Who Killed Jeffrey Epstein?: The Inner Circle
programme.desc: Jeffrey Epstein leverages his considerable power and influence to avoid serious repercussions from sexual assault charges in Florida. And the accused pedophile continues to add elites to his growing social circle, including royalty.

programme.title: Who Killed Jeffrey Epstein?: Suicide or Murder?
programme.desc: In July 2019, Jeffrey Epstein is arrested for sex trafficking, and weeks later, he's found dying in his prison cell. When the official ruling of suicide is questioned, conspiracy theories take on new life.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: Memorial Day Murder
programme.desc: Chris Northam is an entrepreneur building his extreme sports business in the suburb of Roseville, California. When he is fatally gunned down in his warehouse, detectives look to his disgruntled employees and his mistress in search of the killer.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: The Wolf and the Sheep
programme.desc: Kevin and Tabatha Bryant are a picture-perfect couple, living with their two young sons in Penfield, New York. But when Tabatha is found stabbed to death at home, a steamy affair and many double lives are revealed to the town's unsuspecting residents.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: Killer Collection
programme.desc: Gary and Jan Tyrrell are a beloved couple living in a quaint suburb of Springfield, Missouri. The tight-knit community is soon rocked by their double homicide, with friends and neighbours looking at those closest to the pair as their potential killer.

programme.title: American Monster: Who Am I?
programme.desc: When Dianne Hart and Donnie Rudd begin an affair in a small Chicago suburb, Dianne's kids hope that their mom has found love. But instead it triggers a series of bizarre lies and deceptions that reveal a cold-hearted killer.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture
programme.desc: See the most memorable manhunts, task force shutdowns and undercover operations.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Charlie Richardson
programme.desc: Charlie Richardson was the head of the notorious Richardson gang who built up a lucrative empire by extortion, fraud and torture. Enter Gerald MacArthur who began a painstaking investigation at a time when corruption was rife in the Metropolitan Police.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: The Mafia's Banker
programme.desc: A close associate of longtime Teamsters President Jimmy Hoffa and associated with the Chicago Outfit, Alan Dorfman embezzled millions for the mob and himself until he was violently murdered in 1983.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: The Krays
programme.desc: English gangsters and twin brothers Ronald and Reginald Kray were the foremost perpetrators of organized crime in the East End of London during the '50s and '60s.

programme.title: America's Most Badass: Living on the Edge

programme.title: American Lawmen: Petrosino vs. the Mafia
programme.desc: Turn-of-the-century Little Italy is a dangerous place, but as New York City's first Italian-American detective, Joe Petrosino is determined to do whatever it takes to protect his people.

programme.desc: During the Great Depression, a violent crime wave is sweeping the nation. It was up to the FBI's Melvin Purvis to lead a massive manhunt for the most dangerous men in America.

programme.desc: The SAS go behind enemy lines and have revolutionised the global war on terrorism.

programme.title: Weaponology: Rangers

programme.title: Weaponology: Green Berets

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: After blocking the Germans right outside of Moscow, Stalin now faces Hitler's second assault. The world's fate will be decided in Stalingrad. Like in Leningrad, men, women, and children are plunged into hell and sacrificed.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin

programme.title: HP Computer Workshop

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Rework in Wisconsin
programme.desc: A couple finds a fixer-upper in Wisconsin that overlooks Lake Michigan and they're doing all the renovation work themselves. He's a contractor with experience renovating properties, and she's ready to join him and get her hands dirty.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Desert Pond Hideaway
programme.desc: Chase and the team travel to a secluded piece of land close to Desert Pond to help a couple turn their forgotten shack into a relaxing retreat. The couple have big ambitions leaving the crew stretching a $30,000 budget in only four weeks.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Family Fishing Cabin
programme.desc: The crew work to save an old cabin in Oakland, Maine, that Eric purchased from his father. He hopes the renovation will give the cabin many more years of life so he can shire his childhood memories there with his own children.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Past, Present and Future
programme.desc: A couple's Belle Island camp has a long multi-generational history within their family spanning nearly 100 years. Their camp is an ongoing focus of family life and they are now ready to make its preservation their main priority.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Rebuilding The Old Schoolhouse
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team of Cabin Masters hike through the woods of Dedham, ME, to restore a dilapidated family camp that was once the old schoolhouse. A serious case of rot threatens to close down the entire project.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Kids' Dream Lake House
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team help a DIY homeowner jumpstart his project and renovate with kids in mind. With a budget of $30,000 and a July 1st deadline, the masters are going to have to use their imagination on this one.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Veterans' Retreat
programme.desc: A man is building a retreat to help combat-injured veterans and their families adjust to their new normal. The team are tasked with turning a cottage into an ADA-compliant event center. The key feature will be a deck that can accommodate up to 40.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Passport to Greenville
programme.desc: A couple fell in love with the stunning views of Greenville Junction, Maine, but the cabin they purchased is in need of some serious work to make it livable year-round for their extended family.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Dilapidated Island Cabin
programme.desc: Chase and his team tackle a 1930s dilapidated island cabin with major rot issues. They have a budget of $30,000 and six weeks to complete the project.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Family's Empty Nest
programme.desc: A family has the resources to give their Lincolnville, Maine, cabin the love it deserves now that their four children are almost done with college. However the cabin has been neglected for 25 years and corners were cut in the original build.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Taking It to the Finish Line
programme.desc: Chase and the team are hired to finish a cabin for a homeowner that's been collecting materials for years but just hasn't been able to finish the project.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Golden Years Family Camp
programme.desc: After buying her parents' old summer camp in Bridgton, a mother calls on the crew to help her completely renovate the home for her parents to retire in full-time. With a $40,000 budget and an open time line, the crew transform it into a retirement space.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Oyster Farm Shack
programme.desc: Ashley Morrill and her team of builders find themselves rebuilding an old oyster shack for a working oyster farm in Edgecomb, Maine.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Cabin Overhaul
programme.desc: It's a Cabin Masters conundrum as Chase and the team are challenged to take a former garage and turn it into a home that will comfortably accommodate six siblings and their seventeen kids.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Lobster Legacy Shack
programme.desc: A couple inherited their quaint cabin from his grandfather, who originally built the cabin by hand in 1978. With a newly built wharf, the team focus on transforming the former fish and lobster shack into a fun family cabin.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: An Uphill Battle
programme.desc: Lifelong Mainers bought their Belgrade cabin in 1987 and have maintained it over the years, but the list of needed repairs continues to grow. Chase and the team give the camp much-needed life by rebuilding its front wall and replacing the heating system.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Shaw Camp Re-Imagination
programme.desc: Following a two-year search, Greg and Denise uncovered their 'diamond in the rough' when they purchased a cabin that was untouched for years on the beautiful shore of Messalonskee Lake in Sidney.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: A Grind Is a Terrible Thing to Waste: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown "reloads" this classic episode with a surprising new cheeseburger procedure and the "lost" ground meat dish the food sensors nixed back in '99.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: For Whom The Cheese Melts: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown "reloads" his classic fondue show with some cheesy science and a completely new recipe, because he really didn't like the first one that much anyway. The Lady of the Refrigerator returns and boy, is she mad!

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: A Chuck for Chuck: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown finally 'reloads' the pot roast from 2001. He's learned a lot since then, and it shows, because this is what pot roast is supposed to be.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: Oat Cuisine: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown 'reloads' this episode from 2001 with new recipes for his favourite grain, including a no-cook overnight oat pudding and a flavor-charged granola, now with more nutrition!

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Crunchy
programme.desc: Duff, Claire and Brian discuss some of their favourite crispy foods to eat.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Back to School
programme.desc: We're going back to school to learn once and for all what the ultimate nostalgic dish is. We're joining Chef Beau MacMillan in the cafeteria with his Supreme Boffa super-sub sandwich.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Trigger Foods
programme.desc: We're losing all control and giving in to ultimate food cravings. Geoffrey Zakarian starts things off like never before with the most juicy and succulent roast chicken from New York City. Jonathon Sawyer takes it to the next level.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Chocolate Bliss
programme.desc: When it comes to chocolate, the possibilities for sweet treats are endless. On the ultimate list of the best chocolate treats in America, Ali Khan devours an unbelievable Dark Truffle Cake from San Antonio, Texas.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Asian Sensations
programme.desc: Take your taste buds on a trip to the Far East with a list of America's best Asian dishes. Martha Stewart shares a perfect meaty powerhouse in New York City; Alex Guarnaschelli uncovers a heavy-hitting pork bun in Minneapolis, and more.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Detroit
programme.desc: With a menu that includes everything from iconic soul food like short ribs and ox tails, to a restaurant serving up lamb brain sandwiches in the heart of Arab America, to a local man known for his longstanding muskrat recipe.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: West Virginia
programme.desc: Andrew travels to West Virginia, where people are using methods both old and new to prepare wildlife that flourishes in the state's mountains and rivers.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Aruba
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern takes a culinary tour of Aruba, where the climate is as warm as the people. He indulges in local favorites like hearty Dutch pea soup, comforting yet elegant seafood cazuela and sweet, buttery cashew cake.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Baja
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern dives in to the Mediterranean and seafood-heavy cuisine of Baja California, Mexico. From simple smoked tuna to crispy fish tacos, Caesar salad to zesty seafood cocktail hangover cures, Baja's cuisine is an international sensation.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Paris: A Second Bite
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern returns to the European epicenter of fashion, art and commerce. Paris is home to rich and masterful cuisine, and Andrew finds the best places to get everything from traditional pot au feu topped with with bone marrow to fresh steak tartare.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: The Hamptons
programme.desc: Andrew dives into the seafood masterworks of the Hamptons. From delectable surf and turf to buttery lobster rolls, clam chowder to smoked bluefish pate, the Hamptons' dinner scene is sizzling.

programme.desc: For a class assignment, Lincoln and Clyde must start a business, so they decide to sell Lincoln's girl expertise. It's time for the Loud family annual garage sale, and every kid is determined to out-sell the others.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Krusty Koncessionaires/ Dream Hoppers
programme.desc: The Krusty Krab crew sells krabby patties at a concert. And, SpongeBob explores the dreams of his sleeping neighbours.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Best Day Ever/ The Gift of Gum
programme.desc: Spongebob is going to have the best day ever, until all of his friends have problems; It's Best Friends Day, so Spongebob and Patrick trade Best Friend presents.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: All That Glitters/ Wishing You Well
programme.desc: SpongeBob's spatula breaks mid-patty flip; Mr. Krabs installs a wishing well near the Krusty Krab and sends SpongeBob down the well in a bucket to collect the coins.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Good Neighbors/ Skill Crane
programme.desc: Squidward obsesses over winning a stuffed animal; Squid's security system backfires.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Spongebob BC
programme.desc: Thanks to the magic of an underwater thunderstorm, our neanderthal friends discover fire.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: To Save a Squirrel
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick sneak onto one of Sandy's wilderness expeditions only to find themselves left behind. Together they must survive the wild.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Culture Shock/ F.U.N.
programme.desc: Bob tries to assist Squidward with the annual talent show; Plankton is lonely.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Two Faces of Squidward
programme.desc: SpongeBob's good intentions and overzealous nature create chaos in an underwater city.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Pink Purloiner/ Squid Wood
programme.desc: Rejected by Squidward, SpongeBob decides to make his own Squid ventriloquist dummy.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Enemy-in-Law/ Mermaid Man and Barnacle Boy VI
programme.desc: Krabs is horrified when he learns that the secret paramour dating his mother is Plankton.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Tutor Sauce/ Lost in Bikini Bottom
programme.desc: SpongeBob tries to take a shortcut to work, but gets lost along the way. After failing his driver's test, Mr. Krabs decides to teach SpongeBob how to drive himself.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Safe Deposit Krabs/ Plankton's Pet
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs gets trapped in Bikini Bottom's brand-new bank and it's up to SpongeBob and Patrick to save him. After failing to steal the Krabby Patty formula, Plankton gets a pet to cheer himself up.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Gauntlet
programme.desc: April gets a warning from her imprisoned father, and she and the turtles go on a mission to stop Kraang from detonating a mutagen bomb on the city.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Panic in the Sewers
programme.desc: The Turtles must defend their home in the sewers when Bradford tries to destroy it with a dangerous chemical.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Mousers Attack!
programme.desc: The Turtles are split up during simultaneous threats from the Purple Dragons and Baxter Stockman's mechanical Mousers. Donnie and Mikey must prove that their 'B Team' is just as valuable as Leo and Ralph's 'A Team'.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: It Came From the Depths
programme.desc: An unstable mutant alligator possesses a strange piece of Kraang technology. While Michelangelo befriends him, the other Turtles aren't sure whether Leatherhead can be trusted or not.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: New Girl in Town
programme.desc: Leonardo, tired of Raphael's constant criticism, lets his brother try his hand at leadership for a while. Meanwhile, Leonardo meets a beautiful and dangerous female ninja who tries to lure Leonardo to the dark side.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: I, Monster
programme.desc: The turtles must face off against a new enemy, the Rat King, who threatens to take control of the city.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Alien Agenda
programme.desc: April's school project draws Kraang attention.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Pulverizer
programme.desc: A fanboy dresses up as 'The Pulverizer' and decides to fight crime.

programme.title: Danger Force: Return of the Kid
programme.desc: Captain Man and Schwoz have a new group of four young superheroes to train.

programme.title: Unleashed: We're Why the Chicken Crossed the Road!
programme.desc: Impressive animal acts compete for the title of 'Most Entertaining Pet.'

programme.title: The Substitute: Chloe Kim
programme.desc: Celebrities are transformed to go undercover as substitute teachers to surprise a class.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Four Supes and a Baby
programme.desc: Phoebe drags Billy and Nora to the park to meet her crush and his baby brother, but when Max takes the younger kids home, they accidentally grab the real-life baby instead of Nora's doll.

programme.title: The Thundermans: The Thunder Van
programme.desc: Hank brings the Thundervan back from Metroburg for Phoebe to continue her superhero training, but when the kids sneak in to the van for an unauthorized joyride, Hank gives them a ride they will never forget.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Max's Minions
programme.desc: Max takes on a group of freshman to be his minions, but when they turn the tables and make him the victim of a humiliating prank, he must figure out how to regain his place as the baddest boy in school.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Shred It Go
programme.desc: Phoebe freaks out when she thinks her concert tickets were destroyed in the paper shredder, but really Max has stolen them so he can take his crush to the show.

programme.title: Henry Danger: I Know Your Secret
programme.desc: Henry gets a series of mysterious notes from someone and worries that this person may know his secret identity.

programme.title: Henry Danger: The Secret Gets Out
programme.desc: Henry's life as Kid Danger is threatened when Charlotte gets increasingly suspicious about the secrets he's been hiding.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Substitute Teacher
programme.desc: When a suspicious new student shows up at school, Charlotte and Henry think he may be up to something. Captain Man goes undercover as a substitute teacher to learn more.

programme.title: Henry Danger: The Space Rock
programme.desc: Henry brings home a piece of his superhero life when a piece of rock from outer space is more than it seems.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Desserted/ The Gifted
programme.desc: Cricket treats his family to dinner, but Bill is suspicious about how he plans to pay for it. Tilly and Cricket battle to see if Bill lies about liking their Father's Day gifts.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Greens' Acres/ Dolled Up
programme.desc: Young Bill will do whatever it takes to keep the family farm in business. When Tilly and Nancy celebrate Saxon's birthday at a fancy doll store, they set their sights on a seat next to Cantaloupe Sinclair, the tea party's posh VIP.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Space Chicken/ Steak Night
programme.desc: To impress his new neighbors, Cricket attempts to launch a chicken into space. The Greens are excited to continue their traditional monthly steak dinner, but Cricket accidentally loses the steaks on the subway.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Impopstar/ Football Camp
programme.desc: Cricket is mistaken for a pop star and decides to exploit the situation for all the perks of fame.

programme.title: Amphibia: Truck Stop Polly/ A Caravan Named Desire
programme.desc: Feeling unappreciated by her family, Polly hatches a plan to make them pay attention to her. Hop Pop signs the family up to join a traveling theater troupe, hoping to realize his dream of being an actor.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cursed!/ Fiddle Me This
programme.desc: After Anne helps Sprig break up with Maddie, strange things start happening to them. When a popular talent competition comes to Wartwood, Hop Pop goes overboard in training Sprig to win.

programme.title: DuckTales: Let's Get Dangerous! Part II: The St. Canardian Guardian!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: A Friendly Face / Big Chibi 6

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: AquaDan
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Amphibia: Reunion
programme.desc: During a banquet hosted by the toads, Anne is reunited with a friend from home.

programme.title: Amphibia: Handy Anne/ Fort in the Road
programme.desc: Worried that something bad could happen while they are in Newtopia, Anne decides to disaster-proof the farm. Later, Sprig longs for exotic road trip adventures, but Hop Pop's strict road rules threaten to spoil all of his fun plans.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Rollercoaster: The Musical!
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb build a rollercoaster in their backyard, Candace tries to bust them by getting their mom to return from the grocery store early, and Dr. Doofenshmirtz attempts to pull the Eastern Seaboard to the west using tinfoil and a giant magnet.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb's Quantum Boogaloo
programme.desc: Future Candace follows Phineas and Ferb through time when the boys try to find a yet-to-be invented tool for their rollercoaster. However, Candace's actions unwittingly prevent Agent P from defeating of Dr. Doofenshmirtz, which alters the future.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Hand That Rocks the Mabel
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel discover their seemingly cherubic new neighbour, Lil' Gideon, happens to be the town's adored psychic. But when Dipper convinces Mabel to go on a date with Gideon to question his authenticity, she soon learns that his cuteness can fade.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Little Dipper
programme.desc: Dipper feels self-conscious that Mabel is taller than him and is becoming the alpha twin, so he seeks out a magic way to grow himself the same height. Lil' Gideon takes advantage of Dipper's and Mabel's height discrepancies.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Hiya Henry/ People Watching
programme.desc: Tilly tries ventriloquism for the Big Coffee open mic, but her dummy terrifies Cricket. The family plays the people watching game, making up stories about city folk passing by.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Welcome Home/ Raccooned
programme.desc: Cricket Green and his family move from the country to Big City to live with Gramma. Cricket and Bill accidentally disturb some raccoons in the garage, and they invade the house!

programme.title: Amphibia: Cane Crazy / Flood, Sweat & Tears
programme.desc: When Anne breaks Hop Pop's favorite cane, she and her friends set out to replace it; After Anne's bedroom floods she has to share a room with Sprig.

programme.title: Amphibia: Lily Pad Thai/ Plantar's Last Stand
programme.desc: Anne gets a job at Stumpy’s and goes overboard turning the diner into a Thai restaurant. After a rent increase on the food stand, Anne convinces Hop Pop to sell Plantar's Potions.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Nega-Globby
programme.desc: Honey Lemon sets out to cure Globby and make him human again. However, Big Hero 6 must now face a new different evil glob-like villain.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Something Fluffy
programme.desc: When mysterious but adorable creatures called Mayoi suddenly appear in San Fransokyo, Hiro is convinced that they’re part of some nefarious plot by Liv Amara.

programme.title: DuckTales: Challenge of the Senior Junior Woodchucks!
programme.desc: Huey races against Violet in a challenge to be named Senior Junior Woodchuck. Scrooge and the family search for a secret Woodchuck treasure.

programme.title: DuckTales: Double-O-Duck in You Only Crash Twice!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: DuckTales: Timephoon!

programme.title: DuckTales: The 87 Cent Solution!
programme.desc: The kids must stop Scrooge’s unhealthy obsession with a few missing coins to keep him from becoming the next Glomgold.

programme.title: DuckTales: Moonvasion!
programme.desc: The family rallies an army to defend against an invasion. As Della and the kids search the globe for reinforcements, Scrooge leads his ragtag troops against Lunaris’ forces.

programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.desc: Hiro’s faith in his friends starts to fray when they show up late to a mission. Hiro and a short-handed Big Hero 6 must attempt to stop Noodle Burger Boy and his new sisters.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dipper vs. Manliness

programme.title: Big City Greens: Desserted/ The Gifted
programme.desc: Cricket treats his family to dinner, but Bill is suspicious about how he plans to pay for it. Tilly and Cricket battle to see if Bill lies about liking their Father's Day gifts.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas at the Plaza

programme.title: Movie: Christmas with the Darlings
programme.desc: When an assistant gives her final notice, she is drawn into helping the charming, younger brother of her wealthy boss as he looks after his orphaned nieces and nephew through Christmas.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas in Evergreen: Letters to Santa
programme.desc: A woman returns to her home town for Christmas and discovers that the town's historic general store has shut down. Using the skills she has as a retail designer, she is determined to bring the store back to life in time for the holidays.

programme.title: Movie: Love You Like Christmas
programme.desc: A high-powered marketing executive on her way to a wedding is derailed by car trouble. A fork in the road leads her to Christmas Valley, and her unexpected journey leaves her wondering what her life has been missing.

programme.title: Movie: My Christmas Love
programme.desc: A hopeless romantic who can't seem to give a guy a real chance begins receiving '12 Days of Christmas' gifts anonymously at door. She begins to believe that the mystery suitor could live up to her expectations.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas in Love

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Under the Stars

programme.title: Movie: The Christmas Cottage

programme.desc: When a store accidentally orders 60,000 Christmas lights for the holidays, they promote a decorating contest in their neighbourhood.

programme.title: Movie: A Snow Globe Christmas
programme.desc: A cynical woman looks into the perfect world of a snow globe and rants how movies she produces fall short to real life. Smashing the globe she hits herself and wakes up in a perfect snow covered town. Trying to return home, she begins to find happiness.

programme.title: Movie: Wish Upon a Christmas
programme.desc: A business executive returns home to help a family-run ornament company. She finds herself rekindling an old romance with her high school boyfriend who is also the owner of the company.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Case of the Flue
programme.desc: In 1993, when an 83 year old woman was found dead in her home, investigators used clues like flecks of paint, t-shirt fibres, and a cellular phone to work out just how, and why, she died.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shear Luck
programme.desc: Investigators have to reassemble a computer disk that has been cut to pieces with shears, in order to determine the guilt or innocence of an Air Force serviceman suspected of brutally murdering his wife.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Leg Up on Crime
programme.desc: The case of a decomposed body found in an irrigation canal goes unsolved until shoe prints left by the careless criminal while dumping the body of his second victim give authorities the evidence they need.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Step by Step
programme.desc: A wealthy socialite died after falling down stairs, but was it an accident or was it murder? The laws of physics and an accident reconstructionist provided the answer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nice Threads
programme.desc: A woman was found dead on the bedroom floor of her apartment. The crime scene yielded little of value, and investigators wondered if they would find enough evidence to make a case, much less catch a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Road Rage
programme.desc: Bloody sneakers and a purse found in a sleeping bag leads police to the body of a young woman. After collecting, sorting, and analyzing all sorts of evidence, it's a simple mark on the woman's body that will solve the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dessert Served Cold
programme.desc: When a Massachusetts man dropped dead of an apparent heart attack, no one thought foul play was a possibility until police looked into his girlfriend’s odd behavior in the days before his death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Headquarters
programme.desc: Hunters stumble upon a scene that includes a skull and small bones, bits of clothing, a woman's shoe, and a strand of hair. Police determine a woman was stabbed to death, and reconstruct an image of her face to find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Betrayal
programme.desc: With no suspects or motives, investigators can't make sense of a murder when a young woman is found dead near the highway. A tiny piece of unique fibre on the victim's clothing will lead to the most unlikely killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shadow of a Doubt
programme.desc: An unknown assailant walked into a retail store and fired three shots, killing the owner. Police had suspects, but all of them had alibis.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shot of Vengeance
programme.desc: A 34-year-old nurse, who had been experiencing a variety of flu-like symptoms with no discernible explanation, is diagnosed as HIV-positive, and further investigation reveals that the method in which she contracted the disease was no accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files: True Lies
programme.desc: It took a murder victim's 9 year-old child, notations in a diary, and forensic psychology to determine which forensic evidence was important and which to ignore.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Murders on Lake Oconee
programme.desc: Russell Dermond’s headless body is discovered in the garage of his million-dollar lakefront mansion. His wife, Shirley, is found floating dead in the water, her ankles tethered with cinder blocks. One key piece of evidence still remains missing.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Horror at the Campground
programme.desc: A family camping trip to the remote Idaho mountains turns into something out of a horror movie when two-year-old DeOrr Kunz disappears. At first it looks like he may have been abducted, until other disturbing theories start to emerge.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Million Dollar Death
programme.desc: Rebecca Zahau seemed to have it all, until she’s found dead in a multi-million dollar mansion, hanging from a balcony under bizarre circumstances. Police ruled her death a suicide, but some aren’t buying it.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: A woman is found dead of a gunshot wound and police conclude that she was murdered by her husband. Forensic scientists were able to piece together the clues and determine what really happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Without a Prayer
programme.desc: Madalyn Murray O'Hair and her two top lieutenants disappeared with no shortage of suspects. Her abduction may never have been solved if it weren't for the discovery of a headless, handless body, and the serial number on an artificial hip.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Killing Room
programme.desc: Investigators faced a daunting task: to prove Scott Dunn had been murdered, even though they had no body, no weapon, and no witnesses.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ultimate Betrayal
programme.desc: Fire sweeps through a mansion, killing two children, all evidence leads to the mother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Who's Your Daddy
programme.desc: A tiny clue enables police to determine where the victim had been just before she died; it would also lead them to her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Alibi
